location: 473 Dien Bien Phu street (194 Golden building), Thanh My Tay, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Golang, PostgreSql, AWS
job_description:
We are looking for a talented Golang developer to join our startup team, which is focused on building a cutting-edge IOT, IP camera system for the Vietnam, US market. The team is powered by Ampacs International company and consists of experienced professionals who have previously worked at Hubble Motorola.
You will:
Develop, scale, and optimize backend services using Golang.
Design and build internal APIs using gRPC or REST.
Work in a hybrid communication system using both traditional APIs and asynchronous protocols like MQTT.
Apply architectural patterns such as Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and MVC (Model-View-Controller).
Handle real-time data from camera devices, transmitted via P2P, Agora, Orbweb, WebRTC and messaging services like MQTT, RabbitMQ.
Deploy services in a cloud-native environment (Kubernetes) and optimize performance with Redis, PostgreSQL, and caching layers.
requirement:
Responsibilities:
Develop and maintain microservices using Golang, gRPC, AWS
Implement RESTful API
Implement and manage PostgreSQL databases
Collaborate with cross-functional Firmware and Mobile App teams to define, design, and ship new features
Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing systems
Requirements:
1+ years of experience in Golang backend development.
Solid understanding of gRPC and REST API design.
Familiarity with microservices, DDD, and MVC.
Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL or similar relational databases.
Experience with MQTT brokers, , RabbitMQ, Redis.
Proactive, growth-oriented mindset, and strong system thinking.
Hands-on experience with high-performance, high-availability systems.
Experience or knowledge in the following is a plus:
Agora, Orbweb, P2P Streaming, WebRTC.
Familiarity with AWS services, Kubernetes.
Experience with camera systems, video streaming, or IoT real-time applications.
Familiarity with Vue.js, Flutter or fullstack development.
Ability to work in a flexible, hybrid, and friendly environment.

We are building a modern IoT and IP camera platform for the Vietnam and US markets. The mobile team works closely with the backend and device teams to deliver real-time features for smart camera systems, including live streaming, device management, notifications, and cloud-based services.

Our applications communicate with backend services through REST/gRPC APIs and real-time technologies such as MQTT, WebSocket, and WebRTC. The team focuses on performance, scalability, and delivering a smooth user experience across Android and iOS platforms.

You will collaborate with experienced engineers working on cloud-native systems, real-time communication, and smart device ecosystems.

location: 106 Nguyen Van Troi Street, Phu Nhuan, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Java, AWS, PostgreSql, Spring Boot, English, Kotlin
job_description:
About Us
At Topicus, we believe IT should serve society. From healthcare and education to finance, our solutions empower millions of people daily by turning complex challenges into user-friendly platforms. We don’t just build software; we increase self-reliance and reduce vulnerability for citizens worldwide.
With a team of over 1,500+ "Topicans" across Southeast Asia (Vietnam & Thailand) and Europe (the Netherlands, Romania, Portugal, and Iceland), we are constantly expanding our horizons. Our ambition reaches far beyond Europe, driven by a shared mission to make a meaningful difference.

About the Role
You will contribute to our digital consultation platform that allows patients to securely contact their GP online. Through the platform, patients can describe symptoms, share measurements (such as blood pressure or glucose levels), and receive medical advice without always needing a physical visit. It’s fully integrated with regional health systems and GP information systems, helping healthcare providers work more efficiently and focus more on patient care.
Key Responsibilities
Develop backend services using Kotlin/Java + Spring Boot.
Implement microservices and event-driven architecture using AWS queuing services.
Apply Domain-Driven Design concepts into system design.
Ensure software quality through unit testing & integration testing.
Work with CI/CD pipelines via Github Actions.
Collaborate with DevOps for deployments on AWS, Docker, Kubernetes.
Collaborate with the front-end team and contribute to features with Angular.
Build reusable Angular components using Nx monorepo setup.
Work with Module Federation to build scalable frontend architecture.
requirement:
1-5+ years of experience in Kotlin or Java using Spring Boot.
Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL.
Understanding of Microservices architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and event-driven architecture using AWS queuing.
Experience with unit testing (Jest) and integration testing (Cypress).
Experience using GitHub Actions for CI/CD.
Strong problem-solving skills and good English communication in an international working environment.
Nice-to-have
Experience with Angular, Nx monorepo, Module Federation or other modern front-end frameworks and willing to be Fullstack.
Experience working with Docker, AWS, Kubernetes.
Experience with monitoring tools such as Datadog.

MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/
JOB PURPOSE
Phát triển các tính năng backend, frontend và mobile cho sản phẩm MDM, đảm bảo code chất lượng cao, hiệu năng tốt và bảo mật. Đóng góp vào việc xây dựng sản phẩm MDM cạnh tranh trên thị trường Việt Nam.
Develop backend, frontend, and mobile features for Mobile Device Management (MDM) products, ensuring high-quality code, performance, and security. Contribute to building a competitive MDM product in the Vietnamese market.
TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Phát triển backend services: API quản lý thiết bị, policy engine, command queue
Develop backend services including device management APIs, policy engines, and command queues.
Xây dựng admin console (web dashboard) cho quản trị viên MDM
Build web dashboards (Admin Consoles) for MDM administrators.
Phát triển mobile agent app trên Android và/hoặc iOS cho thiết bị được quản lý
Develop mobile agent applications on Android and/or iOS for managed devices.
Triển khai các tính năng MDM: remote lock/wipe, kiosk mode, app blacklist/whitelist
Implement MDM features such as remote lock/wipe, kiosk mode, and app blacklisting/whitelisting.
Viết unit tests và integration tests, đảm bảo code coverage theo yêu cầu
Write unit and integration tests to ensure code coverage meets requirements.
Tham gia code review, đóng góp ý kiến cải thiện kiến trúc và quy trình
Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural and procedural improvements.
Fix bugs, optimize performance và xử lý technical debt
Fix bugs, optimize performance, and resolve technical debt.
Cập nhật kiến thức về Android Enterprise, Apple MDM protocol, SCEP/DEP
Stay updated with Android Enterprise, Apple MDM protocol, and SCEP/DEP

Cử nhân CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đương
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or equivalent.

3-5 years of experience in software development. Prior experience in mobile development is preferred.

Technical Skills
Backend: Golang, Java, Node.js/Python, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL databases
Frontend: React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, responsive design
Mobile: Android (Kotlin/Java) or iOS (Swift), React Native is a plus
Cloud: AWS cơ bản (EC2, S3, Lambda), Firebase Cloud Messaging
Tools: Git, Docker, CI/CD, Agile/Scrum methodology
Kỹ năng mềm
Soft Skills
Tự chủ trong công việc, chủ động tìm giải pháp
Tinh thần học hỏi, cập nhật công nghệ mới
Làm việc nhóm tốt, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ đồng đội
Kỹ năng giao tiếp Tiếng Anh

Growth Mindset: Eagerness to learn and stay updated with new technologies.
Teamwork: Strong collaboration skills and a willingness to support teammates.
English communication skill.
KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ/ KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)
KPI 1: Hoàn thành ≥ 90% story points được assign trong sprint
Complete ≥  90% of assigned story points within a sprint.
KPI 2: Code coverage ≥ 80% cho code mới
Maintain code coverage ≥ 80% for new code.
KPI 3: Số lượng bugs từ code cá nhân < 3/sprint

- Đóng góp vào quá trình triển khai và theo dõi hoạt động của ứng dụng trên môi trường kiểm thử và thực tế.
requirement:

Điều kiện ưu tiên:

- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hệ thống CRM cho doanh nghiệp hoặc tổ chức tài chính.

location: 35/2 Nguyễn Văn Hưởng, Phường An Khánh, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: AI, Prompt Engineering, TypeScript, Python, PromiseKit
job_description:
1. MỤC TIÊU VỊ TRÍ
Tái định nghĩa quy trình phát triển phần mềm truyền thống bằng cách ứng dụng tư duy Vibe Coding và hệ sinh thái Agentic AI. Vai trò này không chỉ dừng lại ở việc viết code, mà trọng tâm là thiết lập, điều phối và tối ưu hóa các AI Agents tự trị (Autonomous Agents) để xây dựng sản phẩm với tốc độ đột phá, đảm bảo tính linh hoạt và khả năng mở rộng cao cho hệ thống của tổ chức.
2. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH
Phát triển Hệ thống Agentic AI: Thiết kế và triển khai các luồng công việc (workflows) sử dụng AI Agents để tự động hóa các bài toán nghiệp vụ phức tạp từ nội dung, dữ liệu đến vận hành.
Ứng dụng Vibe Coding Workflow: Sử dụng thành thạo các công cụ lập trình thế hệ mới (Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Cursor, Windsurf, v.v.) để hiện thực hóa các ý tưởng sản phẩm (Intent-driven development). Tập trung vào việc mô tả logic, cấu trúc và kiểm soát chất lượng đầu ra của AI thay vì lập trình thủ công từng dòng lệnh.
Tối ưu hóa Hiệu suất Phát triển: Xây dựng các bộ công cụ bổ trợ (Internal Tools/Agents) giúp đội ngũ Tech rút ngắn thời gian từ ý tưởng đến sản phẩm (Time-to-market), đạt mục tiêu tăng năng suất gấp nhiều lần so với phương pháp truyền thống.
Tích hợp & Đảm bảo Chất lượng: Giám sát quá trình code-gen của AI, thực hiện kiểm thử và tối ưu hóa các prompt/logic phức tạp để đảm bảo hệ thống vận hành ổn định, bảo mật và đúng định hướng kiến trúc của công ty.
requirement:
Tư duy Sản phẩm & Kiến trúc (Architectural Mindset): Khả năng nhìn nhận bài toán ở mức tổng thể, định nghĩa "Vibe" (luồng logic và cấu trúc dữ liệu) một cách rõ ràng để AI có thể thực thi chính xác.
Am hiểu Agentic Frameworks: Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các framework điều phối AI (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI hoặc tương đương). Hiểu rõ về khái niệm RAG, Tool Use (Function Calling) và Memory trong AI Agents.
Kỹ năng Điều phối AI (AI Orchestration): Thành thạo kỹ thuật Prompt Engineering cao cấp và có khả năng đọc hiểu/debug code do AI tạo ra một cách nhanh chóng trên nhiều ngôn ngữ (ưu tiên Python, TypeScript).
Tư duy Đổi mới (Adaptability): Khả năng cập nhật cực nhanh các công cụ AI mới và sẵn sàng thay đổi phương pháp làm việc cũ để tối ưu hóa hiệu quả công việc.

location: 215B10 Nguyễn Văn Hưởng, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Generative AI, English, JSON, Prompt Engineering, GCP, Python
job_description:
The position
Are you passionate about the next generation of AI systems that can reason, use tools, and execute real-world workflows? As an Agentic AI Developer, you’ll be joining our innovative AI engineering team that’s responsible for designing, building, and maintaining autonomous AI agents on Google Cloud. Your role will not only focus on implementing reliable agentic applications, but also on elevating our AI development lifecycle, improving orchestration patterns, and enhancing evaluation workflows and processes.

We’re looking for someone who thrives on building with LLMs, understands how agents “think,” and enjoys working with tools like Vertex AI, Gemini, and the Agent Development Kit (ADK). If you have a solid programming foundation and are eager to grow in the agentic AI space, you’ll get to take your AI engineering skills to the next level!

What you’ll be doing
Designing and implementing autonomous AI agents using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) in Python or Java
Integrating tools such as REST APIs, Google Search, internal services, and databases so agents can interact with external systems
Assisting in orchestrating multi-agent workflows where agents collaborate, plan, and review each other’s work
Developing and refining prompts and system instructions using techniques like ReAct (Reasoning and Acting) and Chain of Thought to increase reliability
Using Vertex AI evaluation tools to test agent performance, identify hallucinations, and ensure compliance with safety guardrails
Deploying and managing agents on Vertex AI Agent Engine Runtime to ensure scalability, availability, and performance
requirement:
Requirements
Proficiency in Python (preferred) or Java
Basic understanding of LLM application frameworks (e.g. LangChain, AutoGen) and a strong desire to master Google ADK
Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform (GCP), in particular AI platform(formerly Vertex AI), Model Garden (Gemini), and Cloud Functions
Ability to work with RESTful APIs, JSON data structures, and basic SQL or vector databases
Understanding of core reasoning patterns for agents, including planning, memory management, and tool-calling loops
Strong command of English (both written and spoken)
A collaborative team player, eager to learn and share knowledge

Nice To Have
Experience with Google Gemini models and Vertex AI Studio
Previous projects involving RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
Basic understanding of containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines
A portfolio or GitHub repository showcasing a functional AI agent or automation script

Soft skills
System thinking skills to visualize complex workflows and break them down into small, executable steps
An iterative learner mindset, comfortable with keeping up with new SDK updates and architectural patterns in a rapidly evolving field
Safety-conscious, with a strong “human-in-the-loop” mindset that prioritises accuracy and safety over pure speed
Excellent communication skills to work constructively and cooperatively with internal and external stakeholders
High degree of responsibility and autonomy, with the ability to manage your own work in an international environment

location: Tầng 19, tòa nhà Peakview Tower, 36 Hoàng Cầu, Ô Chợ Dừa, Hà Nội, Dong Da, Ha Noi
required_skills: AI, LLM, Java, Cloud, .NET, Python
job_description:
About
Scandinavian Software Park
Scandinavian Software Park is Monterro’s tech hub in Hanoi, home to 150+ software engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Founded in 2021, the park connects outstanding Vietnamese engineers with Scandinavia’s market-leading software companies.
Monterro is a Stockholm-based private equity firm managing EUR 2.85bn, specializing exclusively in Nordic B2B software. We’re building a dedicated AI team called
InFuse AI
to accelerate AI adoption across our portfolio – and it starts right here in Hanoi.

Is this you?
You can’t stop exploring
agentic coding.
Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, the latest open-source agent frameworks. You try them all, you compare them, you have opinions. Not because someone asked you to, but because you couldn’t resist. You read the changelogs. You follow the people building these tools. When something new drops, you’re already testing it.
Maybe you’ve built side projects just to see what’s possible. Maybe you’ve automated parts of your own workflow that nobody asked you to automate. Maybe you spend your evenings thinking about how AI changes the way developers work, not the models themselves, but what they mean for how software gets built. That’s the kind of curiosity we’re looking for.
You’re the person your colleagues come to when they want to understand what AI can actually do for their code. And you enjoy that. You like showing people, not just telling them.
You’ve shipped production software for 5+ years. You know what it’s like to maintain a legacy codebase, wrestle with technical debt, and deliver under pressure. That experience matters, it’s what gives you credibility when you sit down with a developer and say “let me show you something.”

Note:
This role requires a strong software development background but the job itself is coaching and enabling other developers, not writing production code day to day. We’re looking for someone who builds with agentic coding tools, not someone who builds AI/ML models. If your background is mainly in machine learning, data science, or AI research, this probably isn’t the right fit.
Your English is strong. You communicate clearly and ask good questions.
If this sounds like you, keep reading.

What do you do?
Roughly 80% of your time: help developers get good at AI coding
. The other 20% is technical assessment work for investment decisions. But this split isn’t fixed, it will shift based on what’s needed.
Coach and enable developers.
Scandinavian Software Park has 150+ engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Many of them haven’t yet integrated AI into how they code. Your job is to change that.
You’ll work together with them directly in their codebases — not with slides and theory, but with real code and real problems. Pair programming, workshops, hands-on sessions. You’ll help teams find the workflows that actually work for them, at their level, in their stack.
What this looks like day to day:
Sit with developers and show them how to use AI tools effectively on their actual tasks
Run workshops tailored to each team’s tech stack and experience level
Help teams build habits — from spec-driven development to effective agent workflows to knowing when AI helps and when it doesn’t
Support portfolio company teams based in Hanoi with agentic coding training
Help with legacy modernization projects where AI-assisted development can make a real difference
Create practical guides and share what works across teams
You never work in a vacuum. Every engagement is coordinated with the Swedish AI team and/or the engineering leader at the portfolio company. You’ll always have someone to discuss approach with and learn from.
You don’t need to have been a professional trainer. But you need to be the kind of person who genuinely likes helping others figure things out and who is patient enough to meet people where they are.

Support investment decisions through technical assessment
.
When Monterro evaluates a company for acquisition, you’ll help answer: how hard is this to build? You do this by trying to replicate the target company’s solution using AI tools. The outcome is always useful:
If it’s easy to replicate – that tells us the solution has limited technical moat
If it’s hard – we learn more about what’s difficult, which informs both the investment decision and where to create value afterwards
You’ll also use AI to review code quality, technical debt, and architecture in target companies and feed your findings into the investment process.

Your team:
You’ll be part of Monterro’s AI team, Infuse AI – a small, senior team based in Stockholm that works across the entire portfolio. You report to the AI Lead for reviews and development, but your daily work is closely coordinated with our senior agentic coding specialist. Expect daily standups, weekly team meetings (remote) and a lot of autonomy in between.
You’re the team’s presence in Hanoi. That means you’ll build relationships with developers and team leads at the park, and be the bridge between what’s happening on the ground and the AI team’s broader strategy.
requirement:
Your technical foundation
5+ years shipping production software – web apps, backend systems, APIs. You understand developer problems because you’ve had them yourself
Strong in one or more of: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Python
Hands-on, daily use of agentic coding tools. You should know your way around Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar
You understand spec-driven development, agent workflows and how to get reliable results from agentic coding tools
Comfortable with modern development practices: CI/CD, code review, testing, version control
You can pick up a new codebase quickly and form a view on its architecture and quality
Your obsession
You follow agentic coding closely – new tools, new workflows, new ways of working with AI. If we ask you “what changed in this space this week?” you should have plenty to say
You think about how AI is changing the developer role, not just the tooling, but how teams work, how code gets reviewed how architecture decisions shift
You’ve built things with agentic tools on your own initiative – side projects, experiments, automations. Not because it was assigned but because you wanted to
You can talk about what you’ve tried, what worked, what didn’t and what you’d do differently
Bonus: You do this on your own time too, not just at work
Your people skills
You’re a clear communicator in English, written and spoken
You enjoy teaching and coaching and people tend to trust you quickly
You can adjust how you explain things depending on who you’re talking to
You’re comfortable presenting to small groups and larger workshops alike
You have the patience to help a skeptical developer see the value, and the enthusiasm to keep going
How you work
Based in Hanoi, working from Scandinavian Software Park
Flexible with time zones when coordinating with Nordic teams
Comfortable switching between different companies, stacks, and contexts
You prefer showing results over making plans. Quick wins first
You’re comfortable with ambiguity. This role is still being shaped, and you’ll help shape it
Nice to have
Consulting experience or a background working across multiple organizations
Solutions architecture background
Experience calling LLM APIs to build product features (not training or fine-tuning models)
Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
What Success Looks Like
We don’t define success for you, that gets set together with the CTOs and team leads at each portfolio company, based on where their teams are and where they want to go.
But broadly, after 12 months you should have:
Helped the majority of developers at the park actively use AI in their daily work
Built practical resources and guides that teams actually refer to
Completed several AI replication assessments for Monterro’s deal team
Become someone developers at the park trust and seek out
Contributed to at least one legacy modernization project
How to apply:
Send your CV in English to us through the Monterro talent portal.
In your application, tell us:
What’s the most interesting thing you’ve built or explored with AI coding tools recently?
Describe a time you helped another developer learn something new. What did you do, and what made it work?

location: Tòa nhà MB, số 18 Lê Văn Lương, Phường Yên Hòa, Ha Noi
required_skills: Python, FastAPI, Flask, TensorFlow, Microservices, C++
job_description:
2026TD450887 - Agentic Engineer (Python/Go/C/C++ Backend & AI Agents)
Xây dựng phát triển các sản phẩm AI có khả năng tự động lập kế hoạch, ra quyết định và thực thi hành động, được triển khai thực tế ở quy mô lớn, các hệ thống AI thế hệ mới như:
- AI Agents (Autonomous Agents)
- LLM-powered Applications
- Multi-agent Workflow Systems
- AI-driven Backend Services
- Intelligent Automation Platforms
Trách nhiệm công việc (Responsibilities):
- Thiết kế và phát triển các hệ thống Backend tích hợp AI/LLM Agents.
- Xây dựng các Agentic Workflow, A: Planning – Tool Use – Memory – Execution.
- Phát triển các dịch vụ AI dưới dạng Microservices (FastAPI/Flask/Django hoặc Java/Go services).
- Tích hợp các mô hình AI vào hệ thống sản phẩm qua REST/gRPC APIs.
- Triển khai hệ thống AI production-ready với Docker/Kubernetes.
- Tối ưu hiệu năng inference: latency, throughput, cost.
- Làm việc với dữ liệu lớn và hệ thống có lượng người dùng cao (đặc biệt trong tài chính/ngân hàng/chứng khoán).
- Nghiên cứu và ứng dụng các kỹ thuật mới: RAG, Function Calling, Multi-agent systems, Reinforcement Learning Agents.
- Đảm bảo các tiêu chuẩn về bảo mật, an toàn và khả năng mở rộng của hệ thống AI.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ phần mềm, Hệ thống thông tin, Tự động hóa, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc các ngành liên quan
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế làm Backend tại công ty hoặc dự án lớn.
Thành thạo ít nhất 1 ngôn ngữ Backend: Ưu tiên Python, Go, C/C++
Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế hệ thống Microservice Architecture.
Thành thạo một trong các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu:PostgreSQL, MongoDB...
Hiểu rõ API design (RESTful/gRPC), bảo mật và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống.
Có kinh nghiệm với: LLM Agents (GPT, Gemini, Claude...), LangChain / LangGraph/ ADK, Autogen, RAG pipelines, Vector Database(Milvus, pgvector...). Tool-use Agents (Function Calling), Memory + Planning + Multi-step reasoning systems
Thành thạo Git/GitFlow
Có kinh nghiệm: Docker, Kubernetes...
Ưu tiên:
+ Có kinh nghiệm trong domain: Tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán
+ Hiểu biết về AI Safety, Guardrails, Model Monitoring.
+ Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hệ thống AI cost-efficient ở production.
+ Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV)
+ Có kiến thức, Kỹ thuật xử lý dữ liệu:NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Video Understanding
+ Hiểu biết kiến trúc mô hình: CNN, RNN, Transformer, Attention, GNN…
MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:
- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính
- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ
- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc
- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật
- Nguồn Tuyển dụng
Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển?
- Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.
- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.
- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn
Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage:

job_description:
As a Middle-Level AI Engineer, you will be a key contributor to the development and optimization of our AI Agent systems. You will bridge the gap between conceptual architecture and practical implementation, taking ownership of specific modules within our orchestration engine and multi-agent frameworks. You will be responsible for building reliable, scalable features that allow AI Agents to reason, interact with tools, and collaborate effectively. You are expected to work with a high degree of independence while collaborating with senior architects to refine the system's capabilities.

Feature Ownership:
Independently design and implement core features for AI Agents, including tool-use capabilities, function calling, and complex task-reasoning logic.
Workflow Implementation:
Build and refine sophisticated workflows within our orchestration engine, ensuring efficient task decomposition, execution, and error handling.
Advanced LLM Integration:
Go beyond basic API calls to optimize LLM performance through advanced prompting techniques (ReAct, Chain-of-Thought), fine-tuning context window management, and handling embeddings.
ML Model Application:
Integrate and fine-tune traditional machine learning models for tasks such as
detection, prediction, and classification
to enhance agent decision-making and data processing.
Agent Communication & Memory:
Implement and maintain protocols for agent-to-agent communication and memory persistence, ensuring data consistency and state management across long-running tasks.
Performance Optimization:
Monitor agent performance, identify latency bottlenecks in LLM calls, and implement solutions to improve system speed and cost-efficiency.
Code Quality & Peer Review:
Maintain high code standards through rigorous testing and peer reviews. Assist in the technical growth of junior engineers through mentorship and documentation.
Prototyping & Iteration:
Translate research findings and senior-level architectural designs into functional prototypes, quickly iterating on agentic design patterns to prove product viability.
requirement:
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related technical field.
Experience:
3+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 1-2 years of hands-on experience building and deploying AI/LLM applications.

Solid understanding of core ML concepts and practical experience implementing models for
classification, object detection, or predictive analytics
using libraries like Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, or TensorFlow.
Python Proficiency:

LangChain
,
LlamaIndex
, or
Haystack
.

Solid understanding of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) patterns and experience working with vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or Milvus).
Engineering Best Practices:
Deep familiarity with Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud environments (e.g., AWS, Azure, or SAP BTP).
Analytical Thinking:
Ability to take semi-structured requirements and deliver a structured technical solution with minimal supervision.
Multi-Agent Systems:
Familiarity with multi-agent orchestration libraries (e.g., Microsoft AutoGen, CrewAI) or custom state-machine logic.
LLM Observability:
Experience using LLM monitoring and evaluation tools (e.g., LangSmith, Arize Phoenix, or Weights & Biases).

job_title: Remote AI Engineer (Deep Learning Algorithm/ Python)
required_skills: AI, Data Science, Embedded, Python, PyTorch, Deep Learning
job_description:
VisionTech is building an algorithm team capable of truly integrating deep learning into products and onto terminal devices. This role is not just about connecting models or tuning packages; it requires continuously improving model performance under the constraints of terminal computing power, memory, latency, and product limitations. We are looking for someone who possesses the complete capability from problem definition and method design to experimental verification. We hope you don't just use models, but deeply understand the principles behind them, can independently dismantle abstract problems, propose hypotheses, design experiments, and land research results into real products.
Responsibilities
:
Challenges: Continuously improve model performance under limited computing power and memory, advancing from demos to mass-producible, maintainable, and continuously evolving products, and flexibly responding to product issues reported by customers.
Edge AI Design: Responsible for the design, training, optimization, and deployment of Edge AI models to improve product performance under terminal platform power constraints.
Systemic Improvement: Systematically improve model performance based on feedback and demo requirements through model architecture, training methods, loss design, data preprocessing, data cleaning, and augmentation strategies.
Performance Balancing: Analyze performance bottlenecks and balance accuracy, latency, memory, and power consumption according to product requirements and hardware constraints.
Technical Research: Independently read papers, track technical progress, and evaluate applicability and cost-effectiveness for actual products. Deconstruct vague or abstract product problems into verifiable technical questions, proposing improvement directions and planning experiments.
requirement:
Location: Not based in Taiwan. We are looking for partners permanently based overseas (i.e., not in Taiwan), regardless of nationality.
Deep Learning Fundamentals: Familiarity with basic principles including, but not limited to:
Neural network optimization
Regularization
Generalization
Model evaluation and error analysis
Development Experience: Practical experience in model development with the ability to independently complete:
Problem definition
Data analysis
Model training
Experimental design
Result interpretation
Frameworks: Familiarity with at least one mainstream deep learning framework, such as PyTorch.
Engineering Skills: Solid programming skills and engineering habits, capable of writing maintainable, reproducible, and scalable research and training code.
Analytical Ability: Ability to read technical papers and transform them into executable experimental plans. Possess independent thinking and problem-deconstruction skills rather than relying solely on existing recipes or ready-made models.
Edge Constraints: Understanding of common constraints and challenges when landing models on edge/embedded platforms, such as:
Latency
Model size
Memory footprint
FLOPs
Preferred Qualifications:
Publications/Patents: Previously published patents or deep learning papers in international conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICLR, CVPR, etc.).
Specialized Experience:
Model compression, pruning, and quantization
Knowledge distillation
On-device inference optimization
Research/development experience in generative models
Deployment: Experience deploying models to actual terminal platforms.
Data Strategy: Familiarity with the impact of data preprocessing and quality on model performance; experience in data engineering or data strategy optimization.
Project Lifecycle: Experience advancing research topics or production projects from 0 to 1.
Resource Management: Successfully achieved acceptable model performance and deployment costs in resource-constrained scenarios.
Ideal Candidate Attributes:
Not satisfied with just "getting the model running," but asks "why it works, why it failed, and how to make it better."
Actively establishes baselines, proposes hypotheses, and designs verification processes when facing abstract problems.
Finds balance between research depth and product reality rather than just chasing paper ideas or simple engineering stacking.
Passionate about deep learning and willing to translate understanding into real-world systems.
Qualifications & Package:
Education: Master's degree or above in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or related fields.
Location: Not based in Taiwan.
Compensation: Cash compensation will be based on your strength and location. We provide a "competitive" equity package (out company believes that those with IPO experience in this industry understand the high potential of stock options).

Với vai trò Senior AI Engineer, bạn sẽ hợp tác chặt chẽ với các AI Researcher, Data Scientists và Kỹ sư phần mềm để nghiên cứu và phát triển các mô hình AI phù hợp với các bài toán kinh doanh thực tế trong lĩnh vực chăm sóc khách hàng và Conversational AI. Các trách nhiệm chính bao gồm:

Triển khai mô hình AI thành các dịch vụ API để tích hợp vào hệ thống phần mềm và các nền tảng ứng dụng.
Làm việc với các nhóm sản phẩm, kỹ thuật và dữ liệu để hiểu rõ bài toán và xây dựng giải pháp AI phù hợp.
Nghiên cứu, đánh giá và áp dụng các kỹ thuật mới trong lĩnh vực NLP, Deep Learning và Large Language Models nhằm nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm.

required_skills: AI, LLM, Redis, Machine Learning, AWS, Python
job_description:
We are looking for an AI Agent / Applied LLM Engineer to design and build LLM/VLM-based agent systems that automate or support specific tasks based on structured/unstructured data. This role is not just about building simple chatbots, but developing search, reasoning, and execution-based AI systems connected to documents, databases, APIs, and internal systems.
Job Description
Data Pipeline & Preprocessing:
Collect, refine, and structure data (documents, tables, images, logs, DB, etc.) into AI-ready formats. Build pipelines including document parsing, OCR, chunking, and metadata design.
RAG System Development:
Design and implement RAG systems using Embedding, Vector DB, Hybrid Search, and Re-ranking.
AI Agent Design:
Develop LLM/VLM-based agents capable of Query Routing, Tool Calling, Workflow Orchestration, Multi-step Reasoning, and Human-in-the-loop interaction.
System Integration:
Develop AI functions integrated with customer systems (DB, ERP, MES, PLM, Groupware, internal APIs) using backend frameworks like FastAPI.
Deployment & Optimization:
Deploy and operate models and search systems in On-premise or Cloud environments. Monitor and improve response quality, search performance, latency, cost, and stability
requirement:
Requirements
2–5 years of experience in LLM/VLM related projects, service development, or research.
Strong proficiency in Python and ability to implement systems/services to solve real-world problems.
Hands-on experience with core LLM application elements: RAG, Vector DB, search, and Agent Workflows.
Experience handling diverse data sources (documents, images, tables, DB, logs).
Experience with LLM/VLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) or Open Source LLMs.
Understanding of Prompt Engineering, Structured Output, and Tool Use/Function Calling.
Familiarity with data processing (Pandas, SQL) and unstructured data parsing (PyMuPDF, BeautifulSoup, etc.).
Experience with Backend development (FastAPI, Flask, or Django) and Docker-based deployment.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, DSPy, or Haystack.
Experience in fine-tuning, evaluating, or serving open-source LLMs (vLLM, Ollama, etc.).
Experience designing performance monitoring and evaluation metrics (RAGAS, DeepEval).
Experience building AI services in On-premise, private cloud, or air-gapped environments.
Experience with MLOps and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins).
Tech Stack
Language:
Python, SQL, Bash.
AI/LLM:
OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, Hugging Face.
Framework:
LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FastAPI, Flask.
Vector DB/Search:
Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, Pinecone, Elasticsearch.
Infra/Ops:
Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, AWS.
Data/Monitoring:
Pandas, Redis, MLflow, Langfuse.

location: Tòa nhà E.Town Central, Số 11 Đoàn Văn Bơ, Xom Chieu, Ho Chi Minh - Tầng 11, ROX Tower, 54A Nguyễn Chí Thanh,, Lang, Ha Noi
required_skills: Japanese, Scrum, Product Management, AI, Product Owner, English
job_description:
Purpose and Objective
At Money Forward Vietnam, a Product Manager is
“Someone who does whatever it takes for the success of the product.”
As an
AI-Native Associate Product Manager
, you are the driver of product execution and a "Mini-CEO" of your assigned scope. Your mission is to master the
Product Management Triangle
(Engineering, Business, and User) and leverage AI to bridge the gap between non-verbalized user pain points and high-fidelity technical requirements. You are responsible for navigating complex legal and operational constraints to ensure our products deliver world-class value.
About This Role: Responsibilities
Absolute Ownership:
You own the success of your assigned product area. You identify gaps between departments and proactively resolve issues outside the traditional scope to move the product forward.
Cross-Functional Synergy (Sales & CS):
You serve as the primary bridge between the product and the front office. You work closely with Sales and Customer Success teams to ensure they are fully equipped to deliver the product's value. You provide expert-level support by addressing complex product inquiries and translating technical capabilities into business benefits.
High-Fidelity PRD Development:
You translate guidance from Lead PdMs and identified user needs into comprehensive PRDs from scratch. You drive the development process and ensure the output meets the "Money Forward" standard of excellence.
Domain Structuring:
You move beyond "Domain Knowledge" to "Domain Understanding." You are expected to define the absolute boundaries and legal/operational constraints of complex back-office workflows.
Hypothesis-Driven Development:
You utilize the "Demo First" approach. Instead of passive interviewing, you present high-fidelity hypotheses and prototypes to stakeholders and customers to extract true, non-verbalized insights.
AI Management:
You integrate AI tools into your workflow for deep data analysis and to translate vague requirements into high-resolution technical specifications for the engineering team.
requirement:
Your Skills and Experience
Core Competencies (The Triangle)
User/Domain:
Ability to structure complex operations (Finance, Accounting, HR). You must be able to explain the
why
behind a requirement, not just the
what
.
Business & Communication:
Strong interpersonal skills to collaborate with Sales and CS. You act as the product advocate, ensuring that feedback from the field is funneled back into the roadmap while providing the clarity the business side needs to succeed.
AI & Technical Execution:
You utilize AI tools to analyze data and translate vague requirements into high-resolution specifications. You lead the Agile development cycle by effectively communicating business and user constraints to engineers, ensuring the final output aligns perfectly with the strategic product vision.
Minimum Qualifications
1–3 years of experience
as a Product Manager, Business Analyst, or in a high-impact architectural role within the Fintech/SaaS sector.
Track Record of Ownership:
Demonstrated ability to drive projects to completion by taking initiative beyond the standard job description.
Strategic Reverse-Calculation:
Ability to visualize the "Final Goal" of a product and work backward to define the necessary steps, avoiding the trap of incremental "stacking."
Global Communication:
Professional fluency in
English
.
Japanese Language Skills (JLPT N2 or higher):
Essential for understanding the nuances of Japanese back-office constraints and influencing stakeholders in a multinational environment.
Preferred Qualifications
Direct experience with ERP, HR, or Accounting systems for SMEs or growth-stage companies.
Performance Expectations & Career Growth
Success in this role is measured by your ability to evolve from guided execution to independent leadership. You are expected to:
Initiate:
Proactively propose additional features based on a clear understanding of why a specific function is required at a specific timing.
Self-Direct:
Transition to identifying product needs and initiating PRDs from necessity without senior follow-up.
Support & Empower:
Become the go-to expert for Sales and CS, reducing friction in the sales cycle and onboarding process through deep product knowledge and responsive communication.
The "Money Forward" Mindset
We are looking for product "craftsmen" with the tenacity to commit to a product’s long-term evolution. If you aim to build the No. 1 Product Management team in the global SaaS industry and hold yourself to the highest standards of execution, we want to talk to you.

job_title: Analytics Engineer (Advanced SQL, Python, Data Analyst)
location: 35/2 Nguyễn Văn Hưởng, Phường An Khánh, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Data Engineer, Data Analysis, Python, Data Warehousing, SQL, Business Intelligence
job_description:
1. MỤC TIÊU VỊ TRÍ
Xây dựng nền tảng dữ liệu sạch, có cấu trúc và hiệu suất cao để phục vụ cho việc ra quyết định kinh doanh và tích hợp vào các giải pháp AI. Vai trò này tập trung vào việc mô hình hóa dữ liệu (Data Modeling) ở tầng trung gian, đảm bảo dữ liệu thô được chuyển hóa thành các tập dữ liệu có giá trị (Analytics-ready datasets) một cách tự động, chính xác và nhất quán.
2. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH
Mô hình hóa Dữ liệu (Data Modeling): Thiết kế và xây dựng các bảng dữ liệu tối ưu (Dimension/Fact tables) trong Data Warehouse. Sử dụng công cụ hiện đại (như dbt) để quản lý mã nguồn dữ liệu, đảm bảo tính kế thừa và dễ bảo trì.
Xây dựng & Tối ưu Pipeline Dữ liệu: Phối hợp cùng Data Engineer để chuyển hóa dữ liệu thô từ nhiều nguồn (YouTube Analytics, TikTok, Facebook, CRM...) thành các mô hình dữ liệu kinh doanh chuẩn mực. Tối ưu hóa hiệu suất truy vấn để giảm thiểu chi phí vận hành kho dữ liệu.
Đảm bảo Chất lượng & Quản trị Dữ liệu: Thiết lập các quy chuẩn về Data Quality, Testing và Documentation. Xây dựng "Single Source of Truth" để đảm bảo các phòng ban (Creator Management, Marketing, Ops...) đều sử dụng chung một bộ chỉ số thống nhất.
Hỗ trợ Hệ sinh thái AI (RAG-ready Data): Cấu trúc hóa dữ liệu phi cấu trúc và chuẩn bị các tập dữ liệu sạch để nạp vào Vector Database phục vụ cho các AI Agents. Đảm bảo tri thức dữ liệu được "indexing" chính xác cho các bài toán Generative AI.
Phát triển Dashboard & Insights: Hỗ trợ team BA và Data Analyst xây dựng các báo cáo/dashboard phức tạp, cung cấp các lớp dữ liệu nền tảng (Base layers) để người dùng có thể tự phục vụ (Self-service analytics).
requirement:
Thành thạo SQL & dbt: Khả năng viết SQL ở trình độ nâng cao (Advanced SQL). Thành thạo công cụ dbt (data build tool) để quản lý quy trình biến đổi dữ liệu (Transformations).
Am hiểu Data Warehouse: Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống kho dữ liệu hiện đại (ưu tiên Google BigQuery, Snowflake hoặc AWS Redshift). Hiểu rõ các mô hình thiết kế dữ liệu (Star Schema, Snowflake Schema).
Kỹ năng Lập trình & Version Control: Sử dụng tốt Python để xử lý dữ liệu và thành thạo Git/GitHub cho việc quản lý mã nguồn theo tư duy Software Engineering.
Tư duy Hệ thống & Dữ liệu: Khả năng hiểu sâu sắc logic nghiệp vụ để chuyển hóa thành logic dữ liệu. Có tư duy chặt chẽ về tính đúng đắn và độ tin cậy của con số.
Hiểu biết về BI Tools: Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các công cụ trực quan hóa dữ liệu (như Google Looker Studio, Power BI hoặc Tableau).
Kinh nghiệm: Có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực Data Engineering, Data Analytics hoặc BI Developer.

job_title: Assistant To Head Of IT Department (Agile, English)
company: BIDV - SUMI TRUST LEASING COMPANY., LTD
location: Tầng 23, Tòa nhà ROX Tower, 54A Nguyễn Chí Thanh, Lang, Ha Noi
required_skills: Project Management, System Admin, Strategy planning, English, Risk Management, Agile
job_description:
TỔNG QUAN VỊ TRÍ
Đóng vai trò hỗ trợ Trưởng ban trong việc quản trị và điều hành kỹ thuật.
Chịu trách nhiệm điều phối các dự án phát triển hệ thống, giám sát vận hành hạ tầng và quản lý mối quan hệ với các đối tác CNTT.
POSITION OVERVIEW
Serve as a key support to the Head of Department in technical management and operations.
Responsible for coordinating system development projects, overseeing infrastructure operations, and managing relationships with IT partners.
TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH
1.1 Phát triển Hệ thống & Quản lý Đối tác (Ưu tiên số 1)
Điều phối dự án: Trực tiếp tham gia quản lý vòng đời phát triển phần mềm/hệ thống (SDLC), từ khâu thu thập yêu cầu, thiết kế giải pháp đến triển khai và nghiệm thu.
Quản lý nhà cung cấp (Vendor Management): Thiết lập tiêu chuẩn, đánh giá năng lực và giám sát tiến độ thực hiện của các đơn vị thuê ngoài. Đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm bàn giao đúng cam kết hợp đồng.
Tối ưu hóa quy trình: Đề xuất các giải pháp công nghệ mới để số hóa và cải thiện hiệu suất làm việc của toàn bộ tổ chức.
1.1 System Development & Vendor Management (Priority Level 1)
Project Coordination: Actively participate in managing the Software/System Development Life Cycle (SDLC), from requirements gathering and solution design to implementation and acceptance testing.
Vendor Management: Establish standards, assess vendor capabilities, and monitor the performance and progress of outsourced partners. Ensure deliverables meet contractual commitments and quality standards.
Process Optimization: Propose new technology solutions to drive digital transformation and improve overall organizational efficiency.
1.2 Quản lý Vận hành & Hỗ trợ Kỹ thuật (Ưu tiên số 1)
Duy trì hệ thống: Giám sát công tác bảo trì, nâng cấp hệ thống phần cứng, phần mềm và hạ tầng mạng định kỳ.
Xử lý sự cố (Helpdesk): Chịu trách nhiệm cao nhất trong việc tiếp nhận và giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp, đảm bảo tính liên tục của hệ thống CNTT.
Quản trị rủi ro: Xây dựng và thực thi các kịch bản ứng phó sự cố, bảo mật thông tin và sao lưu dữ liệu (Backup & Recovery).
1.2 Operations Management & Technical Support (Priority Level 1)
System Maintenance: Oversee periodic maintenance and upgrades of hardware, software, and network infrastructure.
Incident Handling (Helpdesk): Take primary responsibility for receiving and resolving complex technical issues, ensuring continuity of IT systems.
Risk Management: Develop and implement incident response scenarios, information security measures, and data backup & recovery plans.
1.3 Lập kế hoạch & Tham mưu Chiến lược (Ưu tiên số 2)
Xây dựng kế hoạch: Hỗ trợ Trưởng ban lập ngân sách CNTT hàng năm và lộ trình (Roadmap) phát triển công nghệ thực tiễn, bám sát mục tiêu kinh doanh
Báo cáo điều hành: Tổng hợp số liệu, phân tích hiệu quả hoạt động IT để tham mưu cho Trưởng ban trong các cuộc họp chiến lược.
1.3. Planning & Strategic Advisory (Priority Level 2)
Planning & Budgeting: Support the Head of Department in preparing the annual IT budget and developing a practical technology roadmap aligned with business objectives.
Executive Reporting: Consolidate data and analyze IT performance metrics to provide advisory input to the Head of Department during strategic meetings.
requirement:
YÊU CẦU TUYỂN DỤNG
2.1. Trình độ & Kinh nghiệm
Giáo dục: Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.
Kinh nghiệm làm việc:
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong lĩnh vực CNTT (ưu tiên ứng viên từng làm việc tại nước ngoài hoặc môi trường quốc tế).
Có kinh nghiệm ở vị trí quản lý (tương đương Phó Trưởng bộ phận trở lên) trong các doanh nghiệp.
Ưu tiên: Đã từng làm việc trong các công ty liên doanh hoặc tập đoàn đa quốc gia.
2.1. Education & Experience
Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Technology, Management Information Systems, or related fields.
Work Experience:
Proven practical experience in the IT field (candidates with overseas or international working experience are preferred).
Experience in a managerial position (equivalent to Deputy Head of Department or above) within enterprises.
Preferred: Prior experience working in joint ventures or multinational corporations.
2.2. Kỹ năng & Nghiệp vụ
Chuyên môn: Am hiểu sâu về lập kế hoạch thực tiễn CNTT, quản lý dự án (PMP/Agile), quản lý rủi ro hệ thống.
Ngoại ngữ: Thành thạo Tiếng Anh (nghe, nói, đọc, viết) để làm việc trực tiếp với đối tác nước ngoài và tài liệu chuyên môn.
Kỹ năng mềm: Tư duy chiến lược, khả năng điều phối nhân sự, kỹ năng đàm phán và giải quyết vấn đề dưới áp lực cao.
2.2. Skills & Competencies
Technical Expertise: Strong knowledge of practical IT planning, project management (PMP/Agile), and system risk management.
Language: Proficient in English (listening, speaking, reading, writing) to work directly with foreign partners and technical documentation.
Soft Skills: Strategic thinking, personnel coordination capability, negotiation skills, and ability to solve problems under high pressure.

location: 100 Xuan Thuy, An Khanh Ward, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: AWS, Java, .NET, Software Architecture, English
job_description:
Why This Role Matters

Design, Learn, Deliver, Grow.

As an
Associate Software Architect
, you’ll play an important role in shaping the solutions behind Hansen’s utility billing and customer platforms. This is an early‑career architecture role designed for technologists who want to grow their solution design and systems thinking capability while working on real, large‑scale enterprise systems.

Working alongside experienced Solution Architects and senior engineers, you’ll help translate business needs into clear, practical solution designs that support cost‑effective billing, reliable operations, and positive customer experiences—often in modern, cloud‑based environments.

Your contributions will help ensure Hansen’s solutions are robust, scalable, secure, and ready to support critical services for utilities and communities around the world.
*Note: This is 5-day office-based job in Thao Dien, D.2

What You’ll Do
Support the design of software solutions under the guidance of Solution Architects and senior engineers.
Assist with requirements discovery, clarification, and documentation (e.g. user stories, acceptance criteria, functional specs).
Contribute to solution and integration designs, including process flows, APIs, data considerations, and interface definitions.
Help analyse non‑functional requirements such as performance, security, reliability, and maintainability.
Contribute to cloud‑based and platform modernisation initiatives, including API‑driven and containerised architectures.
Collaborate closely with developers, QA, DevOps, and delivery teams throughout the project lifecycle.
requirement:
What You Bring
A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
A foundational understanding of software development and integration principles (e.g. OOP, APIs, relational databases).
Exposure to cloud‑based architectures (ideally AWS), including APIs and containerised workloads.
Familiarity with at least one enterprise technology or language (e.g. Java, .NET, SQL/PLSQL).
Awareness of non‑functional requirements and an interest in design trade‑offs and system quality.
Strong communication skills, with the ability to document and explain technical concepts clearly.
A collaborative mindset, curiosity, and a strong desire to learn and grow as a solution architect.
Nice to Have
Exposure to Agile or Scrum delivery environments.
Familiarity with architecture or design standards (e.g. UML, C4, ArchiMate).
Any experience in utilities, energy, billing, or customer platforms.
Interest in using AI‑assisted tools (e.g. Copilot) to improve analysis, documentation, and delivery quality.

We are seeking experienced and innovative Back End Developers to join our dynamic team. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills with a keen attention to detail.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
Proven track record of designing and developing scalable, robust, and high-performance software solutions

responsive

Thực hiện theo các quy trình, chính sách và quy định của dự án và tổ chức.

(Core Skill),
thành thạo C# (.NET Core / .NET 6/7/8), SQL Server, thành thạo phát triển Web API (RESTful API, gRPC), cơ bản về ReactJs.
Hiểu rõ kiến trúc Microservice, tách service theo domain nghiệp vụ, sử dụng các công nghệ API Gateway (Ocelot, Nginx), Message Queue (RabbitMQ, Kafka), Service Communication (REST, gRPC).

Có kỹ năng về Cơ sở dữ liệu & Kho dữ liệu bao gồm: thành thạo SQL Server/PostgreSQL/MySQL, thiết kế Database chuẩn hóa (3NF), viết Stored Procedure, tối ưu query. Ưu tiên cao có kinh nghiệm Data Warehouse, ETL (SSIS, Talend, Airflow), xử lý dữ liệu lớn (Big Data là lợi thế).
Có kinh nghiệm cơ bản CI/CD (GitLab CI, Azure DevOps); sử dụng Docker, Docker Compose; hiểu Kubernetes (là lợi thế lớn); triển khai hệ thống trên Linux Server, Window Server, Cloud (AWS, Azure, Viettel Cloud, VNPT Cloud).
Đã tham gia phát triển một trong các hệ thống như: Hệ thống quản lý nghiệp vụ lớn (ERP, LMS, eGov, EDU), Nền tảng tích hợp dữ liệu, Hệ thống API Gateway, Hệ thống xử lý dữ liệu tập trung (Data Hub).
Tư duy thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể hệ thống, khả năng phân tích nghiệp vụ phức tạp, hiểu luồng dữ liệu liên thông giữa các hệ thống, khả năng viết tài liệu kỹ thuật (SRS, API Spec, Technical Design.
Làm việc kỷ luật, đúng quy trình, có trách nhiệm với sản phẩm phần mềm, chủ động nghiên cứu công nghệ mới.
Tinh thần bảo mật dữ liệu và tuân thủ quy định hệ thống.
Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm SSO, OAuth2, Keycloak và hiểu về bảo mật hệ thống (OWASP, Security).

job_title: Backend Technical Lead – PRO Trading (Go, Rust, Python)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
location: Sailing Tower, 111A Pasteur, Ward Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Golang, API, Database, NoSQL, Rust, Python
job_description:
Job Overview
We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam, growing rapidly with a strong focus on technology, professional trading, and innovation. Our mission is to deliver
data-driven and intelligent investment solutions
that empower retail, professional, and institutional clients.
We are seeking a
Backend Technical Lead
with deep expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput transaction processing to join our core engineering team.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for
designing and leading the development of scalable backend systems
that handle hundreds of thousands of transactions per day, with a strong focus on performance, resilience, and scalability. This role
reports to the Project Manager / Head of Business Technology
and is well-suited for candidates with a
strong logical mindset
, an interest in data, models, and technology, and a desire to grow in
AI-driven investment products
.
Key Responsibilities
Lead and mentor a
backend engineering team
working across modern technologies such as
Java, Go, and distributed data systems (SQL/NoSQL)
.
Design and build
scalable, event-driven backend systems
using microservices architecture, leveraging technologies such as
Kafka or similar streaming platforms
.
Take ownership of transitioning systems from
vendor-based solutions to in-house platforms
, including maintaining and enhancing existing trading middleware and services.
Design and implement
core backend components
for a modular and extensible trading platform supporting
quantitative strategies, institutional trading, and AI-driven investment products
.
Develop and enhance backend services that integrate with
core trading systems (equities, derivatives)
, enabling flexible capabilities such as
order management, margin products, and fee logic
.
Build and operate systems capable of handling
high transaction volumes (hundreds of thousands per day)
, ensuring strong
scalability, availability, and observability
.
Optimize system performance to support
low-latency and high-throughput processing
, particularly for trading and execution workflows.
Collaborate with
Quantitative Researchers, Data Engineers, and Product teams
to integrate
market data pipelines (real-time and historical)
, research and signal engines, and performance analytics.
Work closely with
Business Analysts, QC, DevOps, and other engineering teams
to ensure high code quality, system reliability, and alignment with business objectives.
Contribute to and enforce
engineering best practices
, including coding standards, code reviews, and system design guidelines.
Participate in
roadmap planning, system reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives
to enhance the overall trading platform and infrastructure.
requirement:
Must-Have:
7+ years of experience
in backend software development, with strong proficiency in at least one programming language such as
Go, Rust, Python, or similar
.
Solid experience building
distributed systems
, including
microservices architectures
,
event-driven systems
, and
streaming platforms
(e.g., Apache Kafka/NATS Jetstream/Redis Stream or equivalent).
Experience designing and building systems for
high-throughput or transaction-intensive environments
, with a strong understanding of
scalability, fault tolerance, performance optimization, and observability
.
Strong knowledge of
API design and integration
, including RESTful services, messaging systems, or real-time communication protocols (e.g., gRPC, WebSocket).
Experience working with
relational and/or NoSQL databases
(e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB), including data modeling and performance tuning.
Good understanding of
system design principles
, including modular architecture, service decomposition, and reliability patterns.
Demonstrated experience in
technical leadership
, including mentoring engineers, conducting code reviews, and contributing to system design decisions.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to work in
complex, high-impact systems
.
Effective communication skills and a
proactive, ownership-driven mindset
.
Nice-to-Have:
Experience in
trading systems, quantitative platforms, fintech, or capital markets
.
Familiarity with
low-latency or real-time systems
, especially in trading or execution contexts.
Exposure to
securities trading infrastructure
, such as OMS, market data systems, or trading APIs.
Experience integrating with
core systems in financial services
(e.g., core securities, banking systems).
Hands-on experience with
containerization and orchestration
(Docker, Kubernetes) and
CI/CD pipelines
.
Familiarity with
observability and monitoring tools
(e.g., Prometheus, Grafana).
Understanding of
risk control, compliance, or audit requirements
in financial systems.
Interest in
system architecture and platform design
, with a desire to contribute to long-term technical direction.

location: 5A Tran Phu, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Business Analysis, English, UI-UX, Agile
job_description:
The Company
Real Estate Doc (REDOC) is a B2B software platform that breaks the norm by converting traditional real estate and banking documentation and workflow transactions digital!

We are looking for young and motivated technically-skilled individuals to join us and be part of the change in digitising the real estate and banking industry!
The Career Opportunity
Want to work for a Singapore-based Tech Company? We are looking for skilled Business Analysts to work with us and drive the change in the industry.
The Business Analyst (BA) plays a key role in bridging business objectives with technical execution. You will work closely with stakeholders across departments to gather and analyze requirements, design workflows, and support development teams to deliver scalable ERP and SaaS-based web applications. You’ll act as the translator between business needs and engineering realities, with a strong focus on digitization, automation, and user-centric design.
Your responsibilities:

1. Requirement Management

Elicit and document business and user requirements through interviews, workshops, surveys, and on-site observation.
Distinguish clearly between business needs, user expectations, and system constraints.
Write and maintain BRD, FSD, SRS, user stories, and use cases.
Prioritize requirements using MoSCoW, Value vs Effort Matrix.

2. Process Modeling & Documentation

Design wireframes, user flows, process diagrams, and mockups (via Figma, Lucidchart).
Maintain requirement traceability in tools like Jira and Confluence.
Clearly log change requests and impact assessments with proper stakeholder sign-off.

3. SDLC Engagement

Support all SDLC phases: Discovery, Development, UAT, and Deployment.
Work within Agile frameworks based on project context

4. Technical & System Understanding

Understand modern web application architecture, including Frontend, Backend, APIs and databases.
Actively participate in technical discussions with client-side engineers and solution architects to understand implementation feasibility and constraints.
Collaborate with internal technical teams to translate business requirements into clear data models, and system behavior.
Provide rough effort estimates and assist in timeline negotiation based on technical complexity, dependencies, and constraints.
Proactively identify and explain potential technical blockers, security concerns, or architectural limitations when clients raise feature requests or change requirements.
Understand and interpret common system error codes or integration failures to guide clients and internal teams toward quick resolution.

5. Stakeholder & Communication Management

Facilitate alignment between business and tech teams via meetings, reports, and status updates.
Communicate findings, issues, and proposals effectively in both verbal and written forms.
Produce clear documentation: meeting minutes, training guides, user manuals.

6. Product & Project Contribution

Support QA team in preparing test scenarios and validating acceptance criteria.
Participate in sprint reviews and release planning sessions.
requirement:
At least 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst in large scale ERP System and Banking domain
Knowledge of RESTful APIs, web architecture, databases.
Strong Ability to translate business requirements into functional, non-functional, and technical requirements
Strong spoken and written English skills
Understanding of Agile and experience working in Agile driven environments with working knowledge of Agile tools (JIRA/Confluence)
Ability in using suitable tools for business modeling, drawing business flows/diagrams, wireframing such as Balsamiq, Figma…
Strong presentation skills; able to translate technical detail into business context.
Experienced with UI/UX, and with a user centric mindset or understanding
Experience with financial and document management technology is a plus

company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN  TƯ VẤN ĐẦU TƯ VÀ XÂY DỰNG GIAO THÔNG VẬN TẢI
location: Số 26, Ngõ 371 Phố Kim Mã, Phường Giảng Võ, Hà Nội, Ha Noi
required_skills: Business Analysis, Agile, User story, IoT, Waterfall Methodology, Scrum
job_description:
Nghiên cứu, phân tích các quy trình nghiệp vụ hiện tại trong lĩnh vực xây dựng (quản lý dự án, cung ứng, thi công, bảo trì, an toàn lao động, quản lý chất lượng…).
Đề xuất cho ban lãnh đạo về lộ trình, giải pháp và giá trị kinh doanh mang lại từ các dự án chuyển đổi số (ví dụ: BIM, IoT, AI/ML, nền tảng quản lý dự án, tự động hóa).
Thu thập yêu cầu, phân tích, đặc tả và quản lý yêu cầu nghiệp vụ (BRD, SRS, User Stories…) cho các dự án công nghệ trong ngành xây dựng.
Phối hợp với đội ngũ phát triển để thiết kế giải pháp đáp ứng nhu cầu nghiệp vụ, đảm bảo tính khả thi và hiệu quả đầu tư.
Hỗ trợ trong suốt vòng đời dự án, từ khởi tạo đến triển khai và bàn giao.
Tham gia việc kiểm thử nghiệp vụ (UAT), đảm bảo sản phẩm đáp ứng đúng yêu cầu trong mảng nghiệp vụ phụ trách.
Phát triển tài liệu đào tạo và tổ chức đào tạo người dùng cuối. Hỗ trợ quản lý thay đổi để đảm bảo việc áp dụng công nghệ mới được diễn ra suôn sẻ.
requirement:
Bằng cử nhân trở lên về Kinh tế, Quản trị Kinh doanh, Công nghệ Thông tin, Kỹ thuật Xây dựng hoặc các ngành liên quan.
Tối thiểu 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm làm BA trong các dự án liên quan đến ngành Xây dựng, Hạ tầng hoặc các lĩnh vực kỹ thuật có liên quan (ví dụ: Triển khai hệ thống ERP/PM chuyên ngành, ứng dụng BIM, nền tảng số hóa công trường, giải pháp IoT cho giám sát an toàn/thông minh).
Hiểu biết về quy trình nghiệp vụ đặc thù ngành xây dựng (từ đầu tư, thiết kế, đấu thầu, thi công đến bàn giao, vận hành bảo trì).
Hiểu biết về quy trình phát triển phần mềm (Agile/Scrum, Waterfall).
Ưu tiên:
Có chứng chỉ về phân tích nghiệp vụ (CBAP, PMI-PBA) hoặc quản lý dự án (PMP).
Có kiến thức hoặc chứng chỉ liên quan đến BIM (BIM Manager, BIM Coordinator).
Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống phần mềm chuyên ngành xây dựng (như Primavera P6, Autodesk Construction Cloud, Procore, Aconex, v.v.).

location: No. 1 Street Number 7, Him Lam, Tan Hung, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Business Analysis, Project Management, CRM, ERP, GitLab, Jira
job_description:
JOB PURPOSES
Participate in the development and implementation of enterprise technology platforms across multiple domains such as eInvoice, Call Center, CRM, ERP, and DMS.
Analyze business needs and translate them into clear functional requirements to support product development and system implementation.
Work with enterprise clients across industries including retail, F&B, distribution, and finance to deliver scalable and reliable technology solutions.
Collaborate with product, engineering, and project teams throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) to ensure successful solution delivery and continuous improvement.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Work directly with clients (local and international teams) to gather, discuss, and clarify business requirements for implementing technology solutions and SaaS products.
Analyze business processes, identify improvement opportunities, and document requirements (BRD, FRS, SRS, user stories, user guides) to ensure clear communication between business and technical teams.
Participate in the implementation and rollout of the company’s SaaS products across domains such as eInvoice, Call Center, CRM, ERP, and DMS.
Work with enterprise clients and apply best practices from global platforms (ERP, CRM, DMS) when designing and implementing solutions suitable for the Vietnam market.
Collaborate with product, engineering, and QA teams throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) to support both internal product development and client projects.
Provide training and userguide to end-users and stakeholders to ensure smooth system adoption.
Follow company policies in communication, reporting, and task planning, ensuring compliance with information security and quality management standards.
requirement:
Minimum 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst or in a similar role.
Strong skills in requirement analysis, process mapping, and documentation.
Good understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and experience working with development teams.
Experience with CRM, DMS, ERP, or Field Sales Applications (SFA) used in distribution or field sales operations. Familiarity with platforms such as Salesforce, SAP, Odoo, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle, POS systems, or similar solutions is a plus.
Experience working with enterprise clients or large-scale business systems is an advantage.
Familiarity with BA tools such as Microsoft Office, Microsoft 365, Jira, Confluence, Planner, GitLab, etc.
Awareness of information security, compliance, and quality management standards.
Interest in AI-enabled features, automation, or data analytics is a plus.
Good English communication skills and ability to work with both business and technical teams.

job_description:
- Tiếp xúc khách hàng (bên ngoài và nội bộ) để tìm hiểu, nắm rõ, tư vấn để có thể chuyển từ yêu cầu/quy trình thực tế của khách hàng thành các yêu cầu sản phẩm và chốt thống nhất với khách hàng về yêu cầu bài toán.
- Xây dựng tài liệu yêu cầu sản phẩm (SRS, URD), tài liệu thiết kế sơ bộ (Wireframe, Prototype) và các quy trình nghiệp vụ (Flowchart)
- Trao đổi và giải đáp các thắc mắc về mặt nghiệp vụ của đội dự án để đảm bảo sản phẩm được xây dựng đúng yêu cầu.
- Quản lý các yêu cầu thay đổi (CR); hỗ trợ PM tổ chức nghiệm thu (UAT), bàn giao sản phẩm và xử lý các vướng mắc phát sinh trong quá trình triển khai.
- Cầu nối thông tin giữa khách hàng và đội ngũ kỹ thuật; theo dõi timeline, đôn đốc các thành viên hoàn thành công việc đúng hạn và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ cho Quản lý dự án (PM).
- Xây dựng và lưu trữ hệ thống tài liệu dự án bao gồm: Tài liệu nghiệp vụ, biên bản cuộc họp, hồ sơ nghiệm thu, hợp đồng và các thủ tục hành chính liên quan.
- Báo cáo các vấn đề vướng mắc lên cấp cao hơn (người có trách nhiệm về kết quả của sản phẩm/dự án đang thực hiện)
requirement:
- Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành Điện tử - Viễn thông, CNTT hoặc các chuyên ngành khác liên quan
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tốt các tài liệu và thuyết trình tốt bằng tiếng Anh
- Có kiến thức về các kĩ thuật phân tích nghiệp vụ như: các mô hình chức năng nghiệp vụ, mô hình luồng nghiệp vụ, mô hình dữ liệu quan hệ, ngôn ngữ UML, tạo Use case, prototype của sản phẩm/ứng dụng.
- Có năng lực phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề: Suy nghĩ sáng tạo, Kỹ năng ra quyết định
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kiến thức nghiệp vụ ngành ngân hàng, nghiệp vụ về các hệ thống xác thực bảo mật.

location: Tầng 1, Tòa nhà HSC Building, Số 162B Điện Biên Phủ, Phường Xuân Hòa, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Business Analysis, Jira
job_description:
THÔNG TIN CHUNG/
GENERAL INFORMATION
Tên vị trí /
Position:
Business Analyst
(BA)
Phòng ban/
Department:
Sản phẩm
(Product)
Báo cáo cho/
Report to:
CEO / Tech Lead
Số lượng/
Headcount
:       1
Cấp bậc/
Level:
Mid-Senior
MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/
JOB PURPOSE
Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ MDM từ thị trường và khách hàng, chuyển đổi thành đặc tả kỹ thuật chi tiết, đảm bảo sản phẩm MDM đáp ứng đúng nhu cầu quản lý thiết bị di động của doanh nghiệp Việt Nam.
Analyze MDM business requirements from the market and customers. Translate these into detailed technical specifications to ensure the MDM product effectively meets the mobile device management needs of Vietnamese enterprises.
TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Nghiên cứu thị trường MDM, phân tích đối thủ (Scalefusion, Hexnode, ManageEngine) để xác định feature gap
Conduct MDM market research and competitor analysis (Scalefusion, Hexnode, ManageEngine) to identify feature gaps.
Thu thập và phân tích yêu cầu từ khách hàng tiềm năng (doanh nghiệp, trường học, bệnh viện)
Collect and analyze requirements from potential customers (enterprises, schools, hospitals).
Viết Product Requirements Document (PRD) và User Stories chi tiết cho từng tính năng MDM
Write Product Requirements Documents (PRD) and detailed User Stories for each MDM feature.
Thiết kế user flows, wireframes cơ bản và phối hợp với UI/UX Designer
Design basic user flows and wireframes; collaborate with UI/UX Designers.
Định nghĩa acceptance criteria rõ ràng cho mỗi user story
Define clear acceptance criteria for every user story.
Tham gia sprint planning, grooming, review — đóng vai trò Product Owner phụ trợ
Participate in sprint planning, grooming, and reviews—acting as a proxy Product Owner.
Phân tích dữ liệu sử dụng sản phẩm để đề xuất cải tiến tính năng
Analyze product usage data to propose feature enhancements.
requirement:
YÊU CẦU/
REQUIREMENTS
Học vấn:
Cử nhân CNTT, Quản trị Kinh doanh hoặc ngành liên quan
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in IT, Business Administration, or related fields.
Kinh nghiệm:
2-4 năm kinh nghiệm BA tại công ty phần mềm. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm B2B SaaS
Experience:
2–4 years of experience as a BA in software companies; experience in B2B SaaS is preferred.
Kỹ năng kỹ thuật:
Technical Skills
Phân tích yêu cầu: Use case diagrams, user story mapping, process flow
Wireframing: Figma, Balsamiq hoặc tương đương
Agile/Scrum methodology, hiểu biết về sprint workflow
SQL cơ bản để truy vấn dữ liệu phân tích
Hiểu biết về MDM concepts: device enrollment, policy, compliance, app management
Requirement Analysis: Proficiency in Use Case diagrams, user story mapping, and process flows.
Wireframing: Figma, Balsamiq, or equivalent tools.
Methodology: Strong understanding of Agile/Scrum and sprint workflows.
Data: Basic SQL skills for data analysis queries.
Domain Knowledge: Understanding of MDM concepts: device enrollment, policy, compliance, and app management.
Kỹ năng mềm:
Soft Skills
Kỹ năng giao tiếp với cả khách hàng và đội ngũ kỹ thuật
Tư duy phân tích, logic, khả năng tổng hợp thông tin
Kỹ năng viết tài liệu rõ ràng, chi tiết
Giao tiếp Tiếng Anh thành thạo.
Strong communication skills with both customers and technical teams.
Analytical, logical thinking, and information synthesis skills.
Ability to write clear and detailed documentation.
Proficient in English communication.
KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ/
KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)
KPI 1: 100% user stories có acceptance criteria rõ ràng trước khi vào sprint
100% of user stories have clear acceptance criteria before the sprint starts.
KPI 2: Tỷ lệ requirement change sau khi dev bắt đầu < 10%
Requirement change rate after development begins < 10%.
KPI 3: PRD được approve bởi stakeholders trong 3 ngày làm việc
PRDs approved by stakeholders within 3 working days.
KPI 4: Feature adoption rate ≥ 60% trong 3 tháng sau release
Feature adoption rate ≥ 60% within 3 months post-release.
CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG/ TOOLSTACK
Jira — User stories, backlog management, sprint tracking
Confluence — PRD, documentation, knowledge base
Figma — Wireframes, review design với UI/UX
Notion — Notes, research, competitive analysis
Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets cho phân tích
Slack — Daily team communication.
Claude Pro — Support for research, writing specs, and data analysis.
