Hiểu biết về Big Data, Data Pipeline, Data Engineering là điểm cộng, nhưng không bắt  buộc

location: Ha Phan building, 17-17A-19 Tôn Thất Tùng, Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Data Engineer, English, Machine Learning, AI, QA QC, Data Analysis
job_description:
About FWH:
Facilitated Work Hub (FWH)
partners with Norwegian tech scale-ups to employ software engineers in Vietnam under a long-term, one-client collaboration model, where each engineer works as part of the client’s product organisation as a fully integrated colleague, not as an outsourced or rotating resource. Our model prioritises stability, clear ownership, and cultural alignment, supported by a flat, Norwegian-inspired working environment grounded in fairness, transparency, and trust, with local support from a Norwegian Cultural Advisor and a transparent HR setup. We hire self-driven professionals who value long-term collaboration, professional integrity, and meaningful contribution within serious technology companies.
About the client:
Fishency
develops and delivers advanced technology solutions for the continuous monitoring of fish groups across the entire value chain. By combining image analysis, IoT sensors, and Artificial Intelligence, the company enables the collection and analysis of real-time data related to fish health, welfare, and production. Joining this exciting opportunity, you will be able to progress further, by working together with other high level and experienced colleagues like yourself. You'll have close contact with the management and have a voice to give your ideas and input as we work in a Norwegian style
flat hierarchy
.
Annotation and Data Quality overview:
Annotation work is a critical part of Fishency's value creation and forms the foundation for precise and robust machine learning models. The work is organised with a clear separation between ownership, quality assurance, and operational production to ensure high quality, scalability, and low risk.
Fishency owns the entire annotation process, methodology, and quality standards. Production is carried out by dedicated annotation resources in Vietnam via FWH, under close Norwegian leadership and oversight.
About the role:
The annotation resources in Vietnam perform operational annotation work based on defined guidelines and quality requirements. Resources are dedicated exclusively to Fishency and work solely within Fishency's annotation tools and processes.
Responsibilities:
Perform video and sequence annotation of fish and relevant objects
Annotate very small objects (down to millimetre-level) with high precision
Perform multi-class annotation in accordance with defined taxonomies
Follow established workflows, instructions, and quality standards
Report deviations, ambiguities, and improvement suggestions to the QC lead
requirement:
Framework conditions:
No requirement for domain expertise or programming skills
Work is evaluated based on precision, consistency, and adherence to instructions
Final quality approval is always performed by the Norwegian QC and annotation lead
Annotation resources represent a scalable production capacity that can be expanded in line with demand, without compromising quality or control.
Personalities:
High integrity, confidentiality, and genuine commitment to excellence

Review and guide data-related designs from projects and vendors.

Support data readiness for analytics, AI, and automation initiatives.

Data professionals ready to move from implementation to architecture.

Practitioners who want their data designs to power real-world decisions.

job_title: Remote Data Engineer - AI Data Platform Japan (Python)
required_skills: Python, AI, Data Engineer, JSON, AWS, SQL
job_description:
What Makes SalesNow Different
Data scale: 8B data points, 14M records, 2.3M daily updates (vs. 1M-100M rows at typical companies)
Data ownership: You build and own Japan's largest corporate intelligence platform (vs. processing someone else's data)
AI integration: 20+ AI pipelines in production, MCP Server live (vs. "We're planning to use AI someday")
Dev tools: Claude Code MAX ($200/month), Cursor, CodeRabbit — all company-paid (vs. standard IDE, maybe Copilot)
Your code's impact: Feeds AI products used by enterprise clients, millisecond latency matters (vs. dashboards no one reads)
Career trajectory: Build Japan's data infrastructure → architect AI data products → global leverage (vs. same stack forever)
Remote work: 100% remote, no relocation required (vs. hybrid / office-required)
Why This Role Exists
AI models are commodities now. The cost of running GPT-3.5-equivalent models dropped 280x in two years. Every company has access to the same foundation models. The war moved to data — who owns it, who structures it, who feeds it to AI.
Oracle's Larry Ellison said it plainly on his December 2025 earnings call: "AI models are trained on the same public data, so they're rapidly commoditizing. AI inference on private data will be an even bigger, more valuable business." McKinsey echoes: "By 2030, the AI leaders will be defined not by who trained the biggest model, but by who built the most reliable systems on proprietary data."
SalesNow owns 14 million company records and 8 billion data points — the largest structured corporate intelligence platform in Japan. This data updates 2.3 million records daily, with differential refresh as fast as every 60 seconds. Hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings — all structured, all real-time, all proprietary.
This data doesn't exist inside any LLM's training set. The only way to access it is through SalesNow. That's the moat.
We need data engineers who can build and scale the pipelines that make this moat wider every day.
What You'll Build
This is not "maintain existing ETL jobs." You're building the data nervous system of Japan's corporate intelligence.
The Scale
14 million+ company records across Japan's entire business landscape — from Toyota to a 3-person startup in Okinawa
8 billion data points structured and queryable at millisecond speed
2.3 million records updated daily — hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings
Sub-minute differential refresh — when a company posts a new job or announces funding, SalesNow knows within 60 seconds
42+ data sources feeding into a unified schema
5 delivery formats: Web app UI / CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) / MCP Server / Data API / Custom AI Agents
AI-Native Development Culture
SalesNow doesn't just "use AI." AI is the operating system of how we build software. What this means for you, concretely:
Claude Code MAX — Company-paid for every engineer. This is a $200/month tool that most individual developers can't justify. You get it Day 1, fully covered
Monthly AI tool budget — Tens of thousands of yen per person, on top of Claude Code MAX, for any AI tool you want to try
CodeRabbit — Automated PR reviews powered by AI. Every pull request gets AI review before human review
Vibe coding culture — Not just engineers. The CEO, COO, and business teams all write code with AI assistance. When you propose a technical solution, leadership actually understands it
20+ AI pipelines in production — X post generation, candidate screening, PR monitoring, behavioral analytics, financial page generation — all running daily in production. This isn't a demo. It's how the company operates
No "AI committee" or "innovation lab" gatekeeping — You want to try a new approach? Ship it. The decision loop is measured in hours, not quarters
Why this matters for your career: In 3 years, every engineering role will require AI-native development skills. At SalesNow, you build those skills now — not by watching tutorials, but by shipping production AI systems daily.
Before You Apply — Quick Self-Check
Please confirm the following before submitting your application:
I have professional experience building data pipelines or data processing systems with Python
I have professional experience writing SQL queries and working with databases
I am available for full-time remote work (40 hours/week)
Bonus: Japanese language ability (JLPT N3+) is a strong plus.
In Your Cover Letter, Please Include:
1. The largest dataset or data pipeline you've worked with — how many records per day, and what did it do?
2. What was the most technically challenging problem you solved in your career? (1-2 sentences is fine)
3. Which data tools or frameworks have you used? (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Spark, Kafka, Elasticsearch — list any that apply)
requirement:
Must Have
2+ years
of professional data engineering experience
Strong Python skills — clean, testable pipeline code
Strong SQL skills — complex queries, window functions, query optimization
Experience with at least one orchestration tool — Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, or equivalent
Experience with relational databases at scale — PostgreSQL preferred
English proficiency (professional working level)
Nice to Have
Experience with Elasticsearch or OpenSearch at scale
dbt experience
Web scraping / large-scale data collection systems
Experience with data quality frameworks and monitoring
AWS experience (S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, etc.)
RAG pipeline / vector database experience
Experience processing 1M+ records daily
Japanese language ability (JLPT N3 or above)

required_skills: Data Engineer, Data Warehousing, Data modeling, ETL, SQL, AWS
job_description:
ABOUT FPT SOFTWARE
FPT Software, a subsidiary of FPT Group, is a leading global IT service provider headquartered in Vietnam. With 33,000+ employees in 88 offices across 30 countries, we serve 1,100+ clients, including 96 Fortune 500 companies.

We believe diversity fuels innovation and strive to create an inclusive workplace where talents of all backgrounds thrive. We welcome expatriates and international professionals to bring fresh perspectives and help shape the future of technology.

RESPONSIBILITIES
Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines and data processing systems on cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)
Build and optimize ETL/ELT workflows to ingest, transform, and serve data for analytics and business use cases
Work with large-scale structured and unstructured datasets, ensuring data quality, reliability, and performance
Collaborate with Data Scientists, Analysts, and cross-functional teams to support data-driven solutions
Develop and manage data storage solutions such as Data Lakes and Data Warehouses
Implement data governance, security, and best practices in cloud environments
Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize data pipelines and system performance
requirement:

location: Tầng 7, tòa Lottery Tower, 77 Trần Nhân Tôn, An Dong, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Data Engineer, CI/CD, Apache Airflow, Python, SQL, Team Management
job_description:
We're looking for a Manager, Data Analytics & Engineering to own Fundiin's data infrastructure end-to-end: the pipelines powering credit decisioning, the models driving business insights, and the foundations enabling ML use cases like credit scoring and fraud detection.
What you will do
1. Own the Data Platform
You are the primary owner of Fundiin's data platform. That means keeping it running reliably, making it faster and more cost-efficient, and evolving it as business needs grow.
Day-to-day, this looks like optimizing and refactoring ETL/ELT pipelines, strengthening monitoring and alerting, and improving data observability, so the team always knows what's healthy and what's not.
Longer-term, you'll shape the data architecture to support new use cases as Fundiin scales.
Stack: Airflow, dbt, Data Warehouse
2. Raise the Bar on Data Quality & Governance
Unreliable data kills trust. You'll build on Fundiin's existing data quality frameworks to ensure every team as Risk, Finance, Product; works from a single source of truth.
This means standardizing critical business metrics (approval rate, default rate, and others), improving data lineage, tightening access control, and making governance a practice, not an afterthought.
3. Deliver Business Impact
You work closely with Risk, Product, Finance, and Operations, not just to fulfill requests, but to understand their problems deeply and design solutions that scale.
You'll help translate ambiguous business questions into clean data models and reliable pipelines, and you'll prioritize your team's work based on where the data can move the needle most.
4. Enable ML & AI Use Cases
As Fundiin deepens its investment in AI-driven decisioning, you'll be a key enabler. That means supporting ML use cases like credit scoring and fraud detection; collaborating on feature design, preparing training datasets, and building pipelines that serve models reliably in production.
You don't need to be a data scientist, but you understand what good ML infrastructure looks like.
5. Lead & Develop the Team
You'll lead a team of Data Engineers and Data Analysts; setting priorities, unblocking delivery, and raising the craft. You're not just delegating; you're in the work with them.
You'll establish best practices for data modeling and development, and create an environment where engineers grow into stronger, more autonomous contributors.
requirement:
Must-have
You've spent 5-10 years working seriously with data, whether as a Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, or Data Analyst and you've moved beyond just building pipelines to actually owning them in production. You know what it means to be accountable for a system other people depend on.
Concretely, you bring:
Strong SQL and Python; these are your daily tools, not things you look up
Hands-on experience with Airflow (or equivalent), dbt, and a Data Warehouse; you've used these in real, production environments, not just side projects
Data modeling depth; you think carefully about how data is structured, not just whether it runs
Production ownership mindset
Comfort with transactional or financial data
Nice to have
Experience in fintech, or working closely with Risk or Product teams on analytics
Familiarity with data quality and observability tooling (dbt tests, Great Expectations, Monte Carlo, or similar)
Exposure to CI/CD practices or event streaming (Kafka, Pub/Sub)
Some involvement in ML pipelines or scoring systems
Prefer candidates from the 9x generation.

job_description:
LARION, a global software outsourcing partner with nearly 2 decades deep industry expertise. We are a 100% Vietnam technology company specializing in turnkey solutions and building highly skilled development teams for companies of all size and types of business. Run by a team of successful entrepreneurs and dedicated technical experts, LARION is a unique symphony where we create a frictionless future for customers with passion, while maintaining full compliance with your needs and objectives.
This is a highly unique opportunity for a Data Engineer/ Data Scientist to join a new and rapidly growing team. In this role you will partner with our close-knit team of quantitative researchers, data engineers, technologists and data sourcing colleagues to analyze and enrich a broad range of structured and unstructured big data, ultimately generating actionable insights and tradable signals.
What You’ll Do
Enriching a wide range of structured and unstructured data into datasets.
Enhancing data quality & integrity by developing validation tools to measure the effectiveness of data enrichment.
Becoming a domain expert on different deep learning and machine earning applications, analyzing & understanding the underlying dynamics and behaviors within the data.
Develop insights based on the data and collaborate with the research team to generate tradable signals.
Developing the utility tools that can further automate the software development, testing and deployment workflow.
Using your expertise to provide technical support for global researchers, including diagnosing root causes of technical problems and proposing solutions to developers.
requirement:
Must-have:
4+ years of experience in Data Engineer / Data Scientist or related roles, with strong Python coding skills (especially in NumPy, Pandas, Jupyter Notebook, PEP8 standards)
Solid foundation in algorithms, data structures, probability & statistics, with strong problem-solving ability (ability to perform at LeetCode Medium)
Hands-on experience building data pipelines and real-time data processing systems
Good understanding of machine learning / deep learning techniques
Strong software engineering practices (Git, clean code, testing, system design)
Good English communication skills for global collaboration
Nice-to-have
:
Experience with C++ (STL, OOP)
Background in finance, trading, or quantitative research
Experience working with time-series data / forecasting
Familiarity with Linux/Unix environments

TCBS cung cấp môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, định hướng công nghệ hiện đại và tiêu chuẩn bảo mật cao.

1. AWS Database (RDS & Aurora Serverless)

Migration lên cloud
Database scaling
High availability & disaster recovery

job_description:
Job Description
Our HCM is an enterprise HR SaaS platform currently in active operation and continuous expansion. The system covers Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations, and Custom Modules for Enterprise Clients.
The DBA will lead database operations for HR SaaS platform, ensuring high availability, performance, security, and reliability across hybrid cloud environments. This role is both hands-on and strategic — responsible for building and mentoring the database team from the ground up, and driving database modernization initiatives, including migration from SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL.
Key Responsibilities
Manage SQL Server and PostgreSQL databases across hybrid cloud (AWS, Huawei Cloud) ensuring 99.9% uptime and performance SLAs
Troubleshoot and resolve critical performance issues (slow queries, indexing, blocking, deadlocks)
Implement monitoring, alerting, automated health checks, and self-healing integrated with Prometheus/Grafana
Lead P0/P1 incident response and conduct root cause analysis
Design and maintain backup, HA, and disaster recovery strategies
Define database standards and provisioning for multi-tenant architecture
Support SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL migration initiatives
Collaborate with other members of the DBA team in other locations
Ensure PDPA compliance and collaborate with internal teams and external vendors
requirement:
Experience
5+ years of database administration experience in production, multi-tenant environments
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field
Master’s degree is an advantage
Strong expertise in query optimization, indexing strategies, execution plans, and SQL performance tuning
Hands-on experience with database monitoring and observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana)
Solid knowledge of backup/recovery, high availability (HA), and disaster recovery (DR)
Proven experience in crisis management, incident response, and root cause analysis (RCA)
Experience building or mentoring technical teams
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills
Preferred:
Experience with MariaDB or PostgreSQL administration
Kubernetes-based database operations
Multi-cloud environments (AWS, Huawei Cloud)
GitOps and CI/CD practices for database changes
Knowledge of PDPA and data protection compliance
Scripting skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell)
Language
Able to communicate in English in a professional working environment (reading technical documents, participating in discussions with international team members)

job_description:
At
OL Vietnam
, we have worked alongside our parent company, Orange Logic LLC, to support some of the world’s largest enterprises with their digital asset management needs. Orange Logic provides a premier Digital Asset Management (DAM) platform that streamlines workflows, enhances collaboration, and ensures compliance across complex digital ecosystems, empowering any team working with digital content the ability to efficiently create, manage, and distribute their content at scale.

WHAT DIFFERENTIATES OL VIETNAM
We are trusted by global leaders to work with over 100 customers, including many of the world's most recognized brands.
Our business is strong and resilient, even in the face of economic challenges. During the Covid economic downturn, we did not implement layoffs or reduce compensation. Instead, we continued to grow, consistently expanding our team and adding dozens of talented members to our R&D department each year.
You’ll work with top engineers and team members who are passionate about building flexible, scalable, and streamlined systems that will define the future of business management.
MISSION
Job Summary:
We’re seeking a
Demo Operations Specialist
who is a key contributor within the Demo Operations function, supporting Solutions Engineers by building, configuring, and maintaining high-quality demo environments used in sales engagements. While aligned to the Implementation team, this role operates in close partnership with Pre-sales to ensure demo environments are delivered accurately, consistently, and on time.

This role is highly execution-focused and process-driven, responsible for translating defined requirements into fully configured environments. Responsibilities include structuring content, applying metadata, configuring UI elements, and enabling workflows that support compelling, repeatable demo experiences. In addition to core demo builds, this role also supports proof of concept environments and maintains shared demo systems used across teams.

Essential Functions:
Demo & POC Environment Setup
Configure demo and proof of concept environments based on detailed briefs from Solutions Engineers, including folder structures, metadata schemas, and content organization aligned to specific use cases and customer scenarios.
Asset Management & Tagging
Source, upload, and organize assets using customer-provided content, stock libraries, or curated examples; apply metadata and taxonomy with a high degree of accuracy and consistency.
UI Configuration
Configure user interfaces including homepages, navigation, collections, and forms to support guided demo flows, POC use cases, and role-based experiences.
Automation & AI Services
Execute AI-driven tagging and metadata enrichment processes; configure basic automation workflows to support demo and POC functionality.
Workflow Support & Testing
Assist in building and validating simulated customer workflows; execute QA processes, complete environment checklists, and ensure readiness prior to handoff to Solutions Engineers.
Shared Demo System Support
Maintain and update shared demo environments used across Presales and other internal teams, ensuring consistency, usability, and alignment with evolving product capabilities.
Collaboration & Documentation
Partner with Solutions Engineers, Implementation, and Product teams to deliver environments on schedule; maintain internal documentation, templates, and best practices to support scalability and repeatability.
The above statements outline what are generally considered the principal and essential functions of this role. Specific responsibilities may vary based on business needs.
requirement:
Key Qualifications:
1–3 years of experience in system configuration, digital asset management, or related technical support roles
Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Digital Media, or a related field preferred
Strong attention to detail and ability to execute within structured, repeatable processes
Comfortable working independently with clearly defined requirements and timelines
Familiarity with DAM systems or similar enterprise platforms is a plus
Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across distributed, cross-functional teams

location: Floors 24-25-26-27-29-31, Opal Tower. 92 Nguyen Huu Canh Street, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: DevOps, Helm, Grafana, Prometheus, Terraform, Docker
job_description:
Join Netcompany’s Operations Department as an Operations Engineer. As an Operations Engineer at Netcompany, you’ll collaborate closely with project teams across United Kingdom, Poland, Netherlands, Denmark, Greece, and Vietnam on international customer engagements. You will play a key role in designing, deploying, and operating centralized cloud infrastructure and governance capabilities across Azure and AWS, with Terraform as the foundation for our Infrastructure as Code.
Our technology stack includes many Cloud Native technologies such as: Kubernetes, Helm, Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager, Thanos, and ElasticSearch. We use Azure DevOps and Azure Pipelines as our main CI/CD platforms, emphasizing security, cost optimization, and continuous improvement through regular upgrades and maintenance.
In this role, you’ll contribute to Cloud Governance, the Cloud Center of Excellence, and Cloud Consultancy initiatives, driving standardized, scalable, and secure cloud solutions across the organization, with a strong commitment to an Open Source First approach.

Key Responsibilities
Design, deploy, and operate cloud infrastructure across Azure and AWS using Terraform as the primary IaC tool
Manage Kubernetes clusters and workloads with Helm, ensuring scalability, reliability, and efficient resource utilization
Implement and maintain monitoring and observability solutions using Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager, and Thanos, along with ElasitcSearch for centralized logging
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps and Azure Pipelines, driving automation and consistency in release management
Enforce cloud governance through robust security controls, cost optimization, and policy-as-code practices
Lead or support system upgrades and patch management, including risk assessments, rollback strategies, and post-change validation
Develop and maintain runbooks, SOPs, and incident response procedures, contributing to reliable on-call and operational support
Collaborate with project teams to standardize infrastructure practices and promote operational excellence across environments
Technologies & Tools You’ll Work With
Don’t worry! You don’t need to be an expert in everything listed below. We’ll give you the space to
explore, learn, and grow
as you go!
Cloud Platforms: Azure, AWS
Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform (primary)
Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes, Helm
Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager, Thanos, OpenObserve
Logging & Analytics: Kibana (Elastic Stack)
CI/CD: Azure DevOps, Azure Pipelines
Scripting & Automation: Bash, PowerShell, Python (and other scripting languages as needed)
Security & Cloud Operations: IAM, network security, Security Center concepts, cost governance, patch management
Networking: Virtual networks (VNETs), peering, VPN/direct connectivity, load balancers
Supporting Tooling: Git (version control), incident management systems, operational runbooks
requirement:
We Imagine That You…
Hold a bachelor’s or master’s degree in ICT, IT, Computer Science, Software/Computer Engineering, Infrastructure, or possess equivalent vocational education or practical experience
1-6 YOEs working in DevOps role
Have a basic understanding of cloud concepts (Azure/AWS), scripting, and monitoring fundamentals
Bring some experience with coding or scripting (.NET, Java, Web, PowerShell) and/or DevOps practices (Terraform, CI/CD) — from education, projects, or previous work
Have worked with or are familiar with CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps/Azure Pipelines, including aspects of release management and automation
Communicate effectively in English, both written and spoken
Have an analytical mindset, are motivated, and approach your work in a structured, organized manner
It’s a Plus If You…
Have prior work experience in a relevant field
Have experience in infrastructure or operations
Are familiar with Kubernetes, containers, or Docker
Hold Kubernetes certifications (CKA/CKS) or can demonstrate equivalent hands-on experience
Have worked with the Elastic Stack (Kibana/Elasticsearch) beyond log aggregation
Understand cloud governance frameworks and FinOps practices
Know about upgrade and patch management, risk assessment, and change management processes

job_description:
1. Quản trị và vận hành hạ tầng hệ thống
Quản lý toàn bộ hạ tầng (infrastructure) của hệ thống eCommerce và ứng dụng nội bộ bao gồm server, network, storage, cloud services và các dịch vụ liên quan.
Quản trị, giám sát và bảo trì hệ thống máy chủ vật lý (Dell, HP…) và thiết bị lưu trữ (SAN/NAS).
Quản lý, cấu hình và vận hành hệ thống ảo hóa (VMware vSphere/ESXi, vCenter).
Thực hiện sao lưu dữ liệu (backup) định kỳ, xây dựng và duy trì kế hoạch DR (Disaster Recovery).
Đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định, sẵn sàng 24/7.
2. Triển khai và quản lý ứng dụng
Triển khai (deploy) các phiên bản eCommerce sau khi fix bug, update hoặc release mới.
Xây dựng và duy trì pipeline CI/CD, tự động hóa quy trình build, test, deploy.
Phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội ngũ phát triển (Development) để tối ưu việc triển khai và giảm thiểu downtime.
3. Giám sát và tối ưu hệ thống
Thiết lập, giám sát và cảnh báo các chỉ số hiệu năng, bảo mật và khả năng sẵn sàng của hệ thống.
Phân tích và xử lý các sự cố hệ thống, xác định nguyên nhân gốc rễ (root cause analysis), đưa ra giải pháp khắc phục và phòng ngừa.
Đề xuất các cải tiến về hạ tầng, quy trình và chi phí vận hành.
4. Tối ưu chi phí và đảm bảo an toàn hệ thống
Đánh giá và tối ưu tài nguyên hạ tầng để giảm chi phí nhưng vẫn đảm bảo hiệu năng và độ tin cậy.
Đảm bảo tuân thủ các tiêu chuẩn về bảo mật thông tin, sao lưu dữ liệu và quy trình phục hồi.
5. Quản trị hệ thống và phần cứng CNTT (System Administration)
Cài đặt, cấu hình, bảo trì và tối ưu hệ thống máy chủ vật lý, ảo hóa, thiết bị lưu trữ và hạ tầng mạng nội bộ.
Giám sát tình trạng phần cứng, thực hiện bảo trì định kỳ, thay thế linh kiện khi cần thiết.
Quản lý tài nguyên compute, storage, network trong môi trường on-premises và hybrid cloud.
Hỗ trợ cấu hình và vận hành các dịch vụ hệ thống: DNS, DHCP, AD, Office365, wifi controller...
Phối hợp với nhà cung cấp để bảo hành, nâng cấp hoặc mở rộng hạ tầng khi cần thiết.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đương.
Tối thiểu 3–5 năm kinh nghiệm trong vai trò DevOps Engineer hoặc System Administrator, ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm trong eCommerce hoặc môi trường hệ thống lớn.
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế với hệ thống máy chủ Dell/HP, thiết bị lưu trữ (Storage) và ảo hóa VMware.
Thành thạo quản trị hệ thống Linux/Windows Server.
Kinh nghiệm triển khai và quản lý cloud platform (AWS, GCP, Azure...) và container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
Thành thạo CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions...) và monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Zabbix...).
Am hiểu về backup, DR, security hardening và infrastructure optimization.
Hiểu biết về VMware vSphere/ESXi, vCenter, RAID, SAN/NAS, network configuration là lợi thế lớn.
Kỹ năng giải quyết sự cố, phân tích vấn đề và làm việc nhóm tốt.
Khả năng làm việc độc lập, chịu áp lực cao và sẵn sàng hỗ trợ hệ thống 24/7 khi cần.
Chủ động trong việc nghiên cứu, đề xuất cải tiến và tối ưu hạ tầng.

• Oversee day-to-day IT operations to ensure stability and efficiency.
• Manage incident and problem resolution processes to maintain high uptime and availability of all systems to maintain business continuity.

• Work with senior management and other stakeholders to align IT initiatives with business goals.

• Encourage and implement innovative solutions to business challenges.
and other responsibilities as assigned.

location: AB Tower, 76A Le Lai, Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: DevOps, DevSecOps, System Admin, Team Management
job_description:
Primary Objectives
• As a DevOps Manager, you are responsible for strategizing and operating a centralized DevOps Service to support multiple product lines. You will act as a strategic liaison to facilitate smooth operational transitions, infrastructure problem-solving, and seamless handovers across technical units.
• Additionally, you will integrate advanced reliability and security standards into the software development lifecycle to ensure maximum performance and protection for all products. This includes maintaining strict compliance with cybersecurity best practices and corporate information security policies.
Main responsibilities
• Drive the establishment of SLAs and standardized CI/CD toolchains to empower development teams across Trading and Investment Banking, ensuring a seamless and rapid time-to-market.
• Promote a security-first culture by embedding automated security testing (SAST, DAST, and container security) into the delivery pipeline, ensuring every product meets strict security requirements before production release.
• Architect robust monitoring and observability frameworks; define SLIs/SLOs to ensure high availability of mission-critical services while partnering with engineering teams to optimize system performance
• Act as a key bridge between IT Service, Infrastructure, and Security teams to design scalable Cloud/On-premises architectures and proactively eliminate operational bottlenecks.
• Lead the transformation toward Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps, driving operational efficiency and mitigating risks through advanced automation frameworks
Other responsibilities
• Drive the continuous development of team capabilities through proactive mentorship and knowledge transfer, ensuring the consistent maintenance of high-level delivery standards across all projects
• Champion DevOps, SRE, and Software Security principles across the organization, serving as a technical authority to instill a culture of excellence
• Lead R&D on emerging technologies to propose and implement innovative solutions that strengthen the platform's competitive edge
requirement:
1. Educational level
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field
2. Knowledge & Experiences
• Over 7 years of professional experience in DevOps, System Administration, or Software Engineering
• Deep expertise in DevSecOps and SRE operational models. A proven track record of integrating robust security standards throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
• Extensive expertise in microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and the deployment of distributed systems
• Direct experience in administering and operating Cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and Containerization/Orchestration ecosystems (Kubernetes, GKE, RKE)
• Proven experience in establishing and managing a DevOps Service model to support multiple concurrent product development teams
3. Technical skills
• Designing and implementing complex, large-scale CI/CD pipelines
• Expertise in IaC (Terraform, Ansible) and the GitOps framework (ArgoCD)
• Designing and deploying comprehensive Monitoring/Observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK, APM) for multi-cluster Kubernetes environments
• Troubleshooting, log analysis, and bug fixing at the network and application architectural level
• Integrating robust security tools and automated scanning into development pipelines
4. Soft skills
• Demonstrated ability to perform under high pressure and execute swift, decisive actions within a fast-paced Agile/Scrum environment
• A process-oriented and system-thinking mindset, with the ability to resolve complex problems through the lens of risk management and resource optimization
• Proven ability to transfer knowledge and provide guidance to elevate technical capabilities across the team
• Strong negotiation and communication skills used to align expectations between innovation-driven initiatives and system stability requirements

company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN THANH TOÁN TRỰC TUYẾN TOÀN CẦU
location: 76-82 Trần Hưng Đạo, phường Bến Thành, Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: DevOps, AWS, MLOps, Linux, AI, Cloud
job_description:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một kỹ sư DevOps/SRE đam mê công nghệ, có khả năng nắm bắt xu hướng nhanh bén. Bạn sẽ là người giữ cho hệ thống Fintech và Vận tải luôn hoạt động trơn tru (đảm bảo tính High Availability, Security), đồng thời tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ/giải pháp AI để tự động hóa, giám sát hệ thống và tối ưu hóa quy trình phát triển phần mềm (AIOps/MLOps).
Trách nhiệm chính
1. Vận hành & Đảm bảo độ tin cậy (Site Reliability - SRE)
Xây dựng, quản lý và tối ưu hóa cơ sở hạ tầng Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) phục vụ cho cả mảng Fintech (yêu cầu bảo mật cao, độ trễ thấp) và mảng Vận tải (hệ thống tracking thời gian thực, lưu lượng dữ liệu lớn).
Thiết lập và giám sát các chỉ số SLI, SLO, SLA. Đảm bảo hệ thống đạt uptime 99.99%.
Xây dựng hệ thống Monitoring & Alerting toàn diện (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK stack). Chủ động xử lý sự cố (Incident Management) và thực hiện Post-mortems.
2. CI/CD & Tự động hóa (DevOps)
Thiết kế và duy trì các pipeline CI/CD tự động, an toàn và tốc độ cao.
Quản lý Infrastructure as Code (IaC) bằng Terraform, Ansible hoặc Pulumi.
Quản lý, vận hành và scale hệ thống Container/Orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
3. Ứng dụng AI & Nắm bắt xu hướng (Điểm nhấn chiến lược)
AIOps:
Ứng dụng các mô hình AI/Machine Learning vào việc giám sát hệ thống (phát hiện bất thường - anomaly detection, dự đoán tải - predictive scaling, phân tích log thông minh).
MLOps:
Hỗ trợ đội ngũ Data/AI xây dựng hạ tầng và pipeline để training và deploy các mô hình AI (như AI định tuyến vận tải, AI chấm điểm tín dụng Fintech).
AI Tooling:
Tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ AI (như GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, v.v.) vào công việc hàng ngày để tối ưu hóa việc viết script tự động, tạo tài liệu, hoặc phân tích nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis).
Liên tục cập nhật các xu hướng công nghệ mới về Cloud Computing, SRE và AI để đề xuất cải tiến kiến trúc hệ thống.
requirement:
Kinh nghiệm & Chuyên môn:
Ít nhất 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí DevOps, SRE hoặc System Engineer.
Kiến thức sâu rộng về một trong các Cloud Provider lớn (AWS, GCP, Azure).
Thành thạo Linux, Networking và kiến trúc Microservices.
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế triển khai và quản trị Kubernetes (K8s) ở môi trường Production.
Nắm vững các công cụ CI/CD (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins...) và IaC (Terraform).
Kỹ năng lập trình/scripting tốt với ít nhất một ngôn ngữ: Python, Go, Bash.
Yêu cầu đặc thù:
Đam mê AI:
Có kiến thức cơ bản về quy trình phát triển AI/ML. Rất hoan nghênh ứng viên đã từng làm MLOps hoặc có kinh nghiệm tích hợp AI/LLM API.
Tư duy hệ thống:
Hiểu biết về các yêu cầu bảo mật trong ngành tài chính (PCI-DSS là một lợi thế) và khả năng xử lý bài toán scale lớn trong vận tải.
Kỹ năng mềm:
Tư duy chủ động (proactive), khả năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, chịu được áp lực cao và có tinh thần tự học hỏi không ngừng.

required_skills: DevSecOps, DevOps, Cloud, SAP, English, CI/CD
job_description:
The DevSecOps Engineer is responsible for integrating security best practices into our DevOps platforms and product environments. This role operates independently from delivery ownership to ensure objective risk identification, reporting, and mitigation.
You will collaborate closely with DevOps, engineering, and product teams to promote secure development practices while maintaining transparency and governance over security risks.

1. Vulnerability Management – DevOps Platforms
Track and follow vulnerabilities related to:
CI/CD tools (e.g. Jenkins, GitLab, wiki, agents)
Container platforms and base images
OS packages, middleware, and supporting services
Coordinate patching and remediation with DevOps engineers
Maintain a
central vulnerability follow-up list
(with severity and status)
2. Security & Network Review
Review and document:
Cloud and on-prem
network architecture
Firewall rules, NAT rules, VPNs, access paths
CI/CD system access and segregation of duties
Identify security gaps and improvement opportunities
Propose remediation actions and track closure
3. Security Standards & Best Practices
Promote and enforce secure coding standards
Assist development teams in implementing security controls
Integrate security testing into CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, dependency scanning)
Contribute to security documentation and internal guidelines
4. Reporting & Governance
Maintain clear reporting of security risks and remediation status
Provide visibility into security posture across platforms and products
Escalate critical risks appropriately
Ensure security assessments remain independent from delivery timelines
requirement:
Technical Skills
Understanding of DevOps practices and CI/CD workflows
Knowledge of application and infrastructure security principles
Familiarity with vulnerability management tools
Basic understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP,
SAP BTP
)
Awareness of container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
Understanding of secure coding practices
Soft Skills
Good English communication required
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Clear and effective communication abilities
Ability to collaborate cross-functionally
High level of integrity and objectivity
Eagerness to learn and grow in the DevSecOps domain
Experience integrating security tools into CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with security frameworks (ISO 27001, OWASP, NIST)
Relevant certifications (e.g., Security+, CEH, DevSecOps-related credentials)

job_description:
The Engineering Director is responsible for providing strategic leadership to multiple engineering teams and departments, ensuring effective collaboration and coordination. They will drive the development and execution of engineering strategies, aligning them with the overall strategic goals of the company.
JOB DESCRIPTION:
Key Responsibilities:
1. Project Management:
Manage team development efforts towards successful iterative project delivery
Ensure appropriate procedures and processes are followed with on-time delivery on projects
Monitor, evaluate, and ensure projects and task for delivery commitments and keep communication lines open and transparent on impediments or risk for on-time delivery
Refine requirements to translate them into functional specs
Collaborate with Money Forward Group and stakeholders to collect and document project requirements, development of user stories, estimates and delivery schedules
Define and enforce well defined processes and standard to ensure quality in all tasks and documentation
2. Team and Department Management:
Scope of management: 30+ engineering talents
Lead and manage multiple engineering teams and departments, ensuring effective collaboration and coordination.
Set clear goals and objectives for the teams, and provide guidance and support to achieve them.
Foster a culture of excellence, innovation, and continuous improvement within the engineering organization.
3. Engineering Development:
Recruit, develop, and retain top engineering talent to build high-performing teams.
Coach to team members, help them grow and advance in their careers.
Deliver training programs and initiatives to enhance the technical skills and knowledge of the engineering team.
Establish vision and career roadmap for technical engineering aligned with business needs
4. Strategic Execution:
Align engineering initiatives with the overall strategic goals of the company.
Develop and execute engineering strategies to drive product innovation and ensure the successful delivery of projects.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure the smooth execution of engineering projects.
5. Stakeholder Engagement:
Collaborate with internal stakeholders, such as product managers and business leaders, to understand their requirements and align engineering efforts accordingly.
Communicate effectively with stakeholders to provide updates on project status, risks, and opportunities.
Maintain ongoing communication with stakeholders, actively proposing and securing new opportunities that align with the growth and achievements of the development organization.
Cultivate the organization effectively to eliminate a passive outsourcing mindset and foster a proactive approach.
6. Operational Excellence
Implement and improve engineering processes and methodologies to optimize efficiency and productivity
Build the Engineering experiences through enhancing the Technical interview process and Engineering Onboarding programs
Drive the adoption of best practices and industry standards within the engineering organization
Monitor and evaluate the performance of engineering projects, ensuring they are delivered on time and effectively
requirement:

Background in Information Technology, Software Engineering, or Information System
Proficiency in English
10+ years experience in managing web project or product development
4+ years experience with people management and stakeholder management
Experience in handling an engineer team (direct or indirect) of 20+ members
Adaptability: Demonstrates the ability to adapt to large, complex, and frequent changes, ensuring the engineering organization can effectively respond to evolving market demands.
Inclusive Leadership: Advocates for diversity and inclusion within the organization, fostering an environment that values and leverages diverse perspectives.
Networking / Relationship Building (People management/ Stakeholder management): Strategically expands networks and builds strong relationships with stakeholders, both internal and external, to drive collaboration and achieve organizational goals.
Risk Management: Designs and implements strategies for effectively managing high-risk initiatives, ensuring that potential risks are identified and mitigated to minimize impact on project outcomes.
Strategic Thinking: Demonstrates the ability to think strategically and influences the direction of the organization, aligning engineering initiatives with the overall strategic goals of the company.

Experience in managing/developing BtoB applications

location: Lim Tower 3, 29A Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, Tan Dinh, Ho Chi Minh - Anna Building, Quang Trung Software City, Trung My Tay, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Java, NextJS, AI, English
job_description:
HRS reinvents how businesses Work, Stay and Pay. Counting more than 5.000 corporations and 40 % of Fortune 500 companies in our customer base, HRS has emerged to the most trusted platform of digital software solutions in business travel hospitality worldwide.  The HRS platform is composed of three engines that each optimize one core building block along the corporate hospitality supply chain: Intelligent Procurement, Smart Booking and Invisible Payment. Through the integration of those engines into one large data-driven platform approach, our Lodging-as-a-Service value proposition enhances satisfaction of corporate employees and travelers, delivers the highest grade of process automation for corporate stakeholders and ensures strongest compliance end-to-end.
Enterprise Solutions is a business unit in HRS which integrates multiple solutions through the interchange of information from various business processes and related databases. Working in Enterprise Solutions means working on our core systems which enable our business processes on a daily basis.
Pay2Reclaim platform is at the core of HRS’s value proposition—simplifying travel payments, automating invoicing, and transforming spend data into actionable insights. Key HRS innovations such as seamless payments, automated invoice validation, fully eligible VAT reclaim, and actionable spend data insights are all powered by the Pay2Reclaim platform.
These capabilities not only drive bottom-line improvements and ensure regulatory compliance for our customers but also play a critical role in enabling HRS’s go-to-market strategy. As Pay adoption grows, it strengthens our global partner ecosystem—unlocking network effects that drive greater value and scalability across the platform. Pay2Reclaim doesn’t just support the travel experience; it powers a strategic financial layer that helps enterprises manage risk, reclaim costs, and optimize spend.
As a member of the Pay2Reclaim teams, you’ll operate at the crossroads of travel and finance, helping some of the world’s leading businesses streamline complex payment flows and gain control over their global travel spend - with visibility, automation, and intelligence at every step.

Lead an engineering Scrum team to design, develop and build a next-generation AI-powered wallet platform for global enterprise travel and expense management, eliminate manual processes through AI-driven orchestration and smart agents managing complex event lifecycles, with backend systems where AI Agents act as the core orchestration layer, enabling dynamic workflows and intelligent decision-making
Proactively collborate with the Product Manager and other stakeholders at Head Quarter to ensure that the technical point of view is brought into consideration while planning and growing the products.
Collaborate with other responsible people for the relevant products to ensure that the technical solution is optimum and best fit to the latest cloud architecture.
Manage and support team members to become a high performing engineering team.
Coach engineers to adopt best practices in software development lifecycle, such as Infrastructure as Code, Automated testing, Continuous Integration - Continuous Delivery/Deployment, etc.
Coach engineers to leverage generative Al tools such as GitHub Copilot etc., to accelerate software delivery.
Collaborate across teams with regards to overarching technical concepts and practices
Participate in the full development cycle: design, development, QA, experimentation, analysis, and launch. You'll be reviewing code, writing design documents, giving feedback on product specification and mocks, and generally helping out wherever is needed.
requirement:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
5+ years of experience building software using Java and modern cloud-native architectures.
3+ years of technical leadership experience guiding high-performing engineering teams.
Deep expertise in Java and Python, with a track record of delivering scalable, high‑performance backend systems.
Strong understanding of core software engineering principles, API design patterns, and microservices architecture.
Hands-on experience deploying and operating containerized applications at scale on Azure or AWS.
Proven experience designing modular, secure, and resilient cloud-native systems.
Direct experience building AI agents, workflow orchestration systems, and integrating them into backend architectures.
Familiarity with AI-based development and testing tools.Solid understanding of payment systems, compliance frameworks, and enterprise-grade security for global deployment.
A strong product mindset with the ability to connect technical decisions to user experience and business impact.
Ability to operate effectively in complex environments, balancing technical excellence and usability.
Passion for building SaaS platforms that integrate seamlessly across ecosystems and deliver measurable business outcomes.
Excellent leadership and coaching skills, with the ability to inspire and grow engineering talent.
Strong presentation and communication skills, with fluency in English and experience collaborating across international teams.

Quản lý vòng đời tài sản CNTT và thực thi quy trình mua sắm thiết bị/phần mềm.
Xây dựng hệ thống tri thức và đào tạo người dùng nâng cao năng lực sử dụng công cụ số.
Responsibilities
Quản trị hệ thống Microsoft 365: Quản lý tài khoản (Entra ID), Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint và tuân thủ các chính sách bảo mật thiết bị đầu cuối (Intune/Endpoint Manager).
Quản trị chuyên sâu Jira & Confluence: Thiết kế và tùy biến Workflow, Permission Scheme, Automation Rules; quản lý Add-ons và tối ưu quy trình làm việc cho các đội dự án (Agile/Scrum).
Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật (IT HelpDesk): Tiếp nhận và hỗ trợ người dùng về phần cứng, mạng, hệ điều hành (Windows/MacOS) và các thiết bị/phần mềm văn phòng.
Quản lý tài sản (Asset Management): Theo dõi vòng đời thiết bị, cấp phát/thu hồi tài nguyên CNTT và duy trì kho thiết bị dự phòng.
Quản lý mua sắm IT: thực thi mua sắm thiết bị/phần mềm IT theo quy trình mua sắm của công ty.
Xây dựng tài liệu hướng dẫn sử dụng (Knowledge Base) và đào tạo người dùng về các công cụ làm việc chung.
Tham gia xử lý sự cố bảo mật, phân tích nguyên nhân và đưa ra biện pháp khắc phục.
requirement:
Trình độ học vấn & kinh nghiệm
Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
Tối thiểu 03 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực IT Support hoặc System Administration.
Có kinh nghiệm thực tế về quản trị hệ thống trong môi trường doanh nghiệp.
Kiến thức & năng lực chuyên môn
Thành thạo quản trị Microsoft 365: Có kinh nghiệm cấu hình bảo mật, mail flow và quản lý thiết bị (MDM). Có chứng chỉ Microsoft (Modern Desktop/Administrator) là lợi thế.
Thành thạo quản trị Jira/Confluence: Có khả năng cấu hình workflow, có thể viết JQL và hiểu biết về phân quyền hệ thống.
Có kỹ năng lập trình (Python/Bash/PowerShell) để tự động hóa các tác vụ quản trị trên M365/Jira/Confluence.
Hiểu biết về quản lý hệ điều hành Windows/MacOS và các thiết bị hạ tầng văn phòng.
Năng lực cá nhân
Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt, tư duy lấy khách hàng làm trọng tâm và khả năng giải quyết vấn đề nhanh chóng.
Chủ động, ham học hỏi, sẵn sàng nghiên cứu các giải pháp công nghệ mới để tối ưu hóa quy trình.
Có khả năng làm việc nhóm, phối hợp đa phòng ban.
Có năng lực nghiên cứu, truyền đạt và đào tạo người dùng.

job_title: Expert/ Senior Business and Data Analyst
location: Tòa nhà Ancora, số 3 Lương Yên , Hai Ba Trung, Ha Noi
required_skills: Business Analysis, R, Python, SQL, Data Analysis
job_description:
1.Data Analysis, Requirements Management & Reporting
Phân tích Dữ liệu & Báo cáo
Gather, analyze and evaluate data requirements from stakeholders across system and departments.
Thu thập, phân tích và đánh giá các yêu cầu về dữ liệu từ các hệ thống CNTT và các bên liên quan.
Perform data extraction, transformation, and analysis from T24, Card Management System, and related banking databases using SQL
Trích xuất, chuyển đổi và phân tích dữ liệu từ T24, Core Card và các CSDL ngân hàng liên quan bằng SQL
Coordinate with API development teams on integration requirements between Data Platform and digital channels
Phối hợp với đội phát triển API về yêu cầu tích hợp giữa Data Platform và các kênh số (Mobile Banking, Digital Branch, RLOS, CRM, etc.)
Design and build data models to support business decision-making
Thiết kế và xây dựng và mô hình hóa dữ liệu hỗ trợ ra quyết định
Conduct data quality assessments, identify anomalies, and recommend corrective actions
Đánh giá chất lượng dữ liệu, phát hiện bất thường và đề xuất biện pháp khắc phục
Create ad-hoc analytical reports for management, regulatory submissions, and audit requests
Tạo báo cáo phân tích theo yêu cầu cho Ban lãnh đạo, cơ quan quản lý và kiểm toán
2.Banking Systems & Domain Expertise
Chuyên môn Hệ thống & Lĩnh vực Ngân hàng
Serve as subject matter expert on T24 core banking modules (Loans – LD/AA, Deposits – AA, Limits, Collateral, Payments – FT, FX, TT, MD) or Card Management System
Là chuyên gia về các module T24 (Cho vay – LD/AA, Tiền gửi – AA, Hạn mức, Tài sản bảo đảm, Thanh toán – FT, FX, TT, MD) và hệ thống quản lý Thẻ
Support data migration planning, and system upgrade impact assessments
Hỗ trợ lập kế hoạch migration dữ liệu và đánh giá tác động nâng cấp hệ thống
Map end-to-end banking processes and identify optimization opportunities through data-driven insights
Mô hình hóa quy trình ngân hàng đầu-cuối và xác định cơ hội tối ưu dựa trên dữ liệu
3.Cross-functional Coordination
Phối hợp Liên chức năng
Act as liaison between DTO and IT Department, between Data Platform and DTO projects  team
Làm cầu nối giữa Khối Dữ liệu và Chuyển Đổi Số và Khối CNTT, giữa Data Platform và các đội dự án của Dữ liệu và Chuyển Đổi Số
Facilitate communication between onshore teams and offshore vendors during project delivery
Điều phối giao tiếp giữa đội nội bộ và nhà cung cấp trong quá trình triển khai dự án
Present analytical findings and recommendations to senior management and project steering committees
Trình bày kết quả phân tích và kiến nghị cho Ban lãnh đạo và Ban chỉ đạo dự án
4.Testing & Quality Assurance
Kiểm thử & Đảm bảo Chất lượng
Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT) with stakeholders
Điều phối kiểm thử nghiệm thu người dùng (UAT) với các bộ phận liên quan
Validate data accuracy against documented requirements
Xác nhận tính chính xác của dữ liệu so với yêu cầu đã tài liệu hóa
Track, document, and follow up on defects through resolution
Theo dõi, ghi nhận và đôn đốc xử lý lỗi đến khi hoàn tất
requirement:
1.Education / Trình độ học vấn
Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, Banking/Finance, or related field.
Cử nhân trở lên ngành Khoa học Máy tính, CNTT, Ngân hàng/Tài chính hoặc chuyên ngành liên quan.
2.Experience / Kinh nghiệm
Minimum 7 years as a Business Analyst or Data Analyst, with at least 3 years in banking/financial services
Tối thiểu 7 năm kinh nghiệm BA hoặc Data Analyst, trong đó ít nhất 3 năm trong lĩnh vực ngân hàng/tài chính
Proven experience working with T24 core banking system (module knowledge: LD, AA, FT, Limits, Collateral, FX, TT, MD) or experience with TranzAxis/ other Card Management Systems
Kinh nghiệm làm việc với hệ thống T24 (các module: LD, AA, FT, Limits, Collateral, FX, TT, MD) hoặc kinh nghiệm với TranzAxis/ Hệ thống quản lý thẻ khác.
Experience with data analysis and reporting in banking environments
Kinh nghiệm phân tích dữ liệu và báo cáo trong môi trường ngân hàng
3.Technical Skills / Kỹ năng kỹ thuật
T24 Knowledge: Strong understanding of T24 modules (LD, AA, FT, AC, Limits, Collateral, FX, TT, MD), data model, T24 enquiries, COB processes, and T24 Transact architecture
Hiểu sâu các module T24, mô hình dữ liệu, T24 enquiries, quy trình COB và kiến trúc T24 Transact
Card Management System: Working knowledge of CMS workflows – card lifecycle, transaction processing, billing, settlement
Kiến thức về quy trình Hệ thống quản lý Thẻ: vòng đời thẻ, xử lý giao dịch, tính phí, đối soát
SQL & Data: Proficient in SQL for data extraction and analysis from Oracle/SQL Server databases; experience with T24 data structures
Thành thạo SQL trích xuất và phân tích dữ liệu từ Oracle/SQL Server; quen thuộc cấu trúc dữ liệu T24
API Awareness: Understanding of RESTful API concepts and ability to define API requirements for system integrations
Hiểu khái niệm RESTful API và khả năng định nghĩa yêu cầu API cho tích hợp hệ thống
Python or R: Knowledge of Python or R for statistical analysis and data processing
Hiểu biết về Python hoặc R cho phân tích thống kê và xử lý dữ liệu
Reporting Tools: Experience with BI/reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau, Excel advanced features, or similar)
Kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ BI/báo cáo là điểm cộng (Power BI, Tableau, Excel advanced features, hoặc tương đương)

location: Tầng 8, tòa nhà Kim Ánh, 78 Duy Tân, Ha Noi
required_skills: Flutter, Android, iOS, Git, Mobile Apps, Figma
job_description:
Phát triển & Tối ưu Sản phẩm:
Lập trình các tính năng trên ứng dụng Flutter đảm bảo chính xác theo thiết kế Figma và tài liệu requirement có sẵn.
Tham gia duy trì các dự án Flutter đang chạy; đọc hiểu nhanh source code cũ và sample để bắt nhịp tiến độ.
Xây dựng Base Code & Kiến trúc: Trực tiếp phân tích yêu cầu, thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể. Dựng Base project chuẩn chỉnh, phân chia module rõ ràng để team dễ dàng mở rộng và phối hợp.
Tối ưu Performance: Profiling và giải quyết các bài toán thắt nút cổ chai (bottlenecks). Xử lý triệt để memory leak, đảm bảo ứng dụng đạt 60/120 FPS. Ứng dụng Isolate để xử lý các tác vụ nặng, update realtime mà không block UI.
Giám sát Hệ thống (Monitoring) & Xử lý sự cố:
Thiết lập và quản lý hệ thống giám sát sức khỏe ứng dụng trên Production (sử dụng Firebase Crashlytics, Sentry, Datadog...).
Chủ động theo dõi log, phân tích crash rate và đưa ra phương án xử lý (hotfix) nhanh chóng, triệt để.
Ứng dụng AI & Giao tiếp (Communication):
Sử dụng các AI Agent (như như Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Claude, Open AI...) để tăng tốc độ viết code, debug, viết Unit Test và refactor code.
Đóng vai trò cầu nối: Thảo luận requirement chặt chẽ với team BA/PM/Design trước khi code.
Giao tiếp kỹ thuật trực tiếp với khách hàng để làm rõ các vấn đề liên quan đến kỹ thuật.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tin hoặc các lĩnh vực liên quan.
Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình ứng dụng với Flutter.
Nắm vững kiến trúc ứng dụng Flutter: Vòng đời Widget (Lifecycle), BuildContext, Element Tree.
Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến tốt với các thư viện State Management như GetX, BLoC, hoặc Provider.
Làm việc thành thạo với RESTful API, WebSockets và xử lý dữ liệu bất đồng bộ.
Kinh nghiệm làm việc trơn tru với các bản thiết kế từ Figma.
Sử dụng thành thạo Git (GitHub/GitLab) và quy trình Git Flow.
Kỹ năng Nâng cao :
Kỹ năng AI: Có tư duy sử dụng AI prompt để giải quyết vấn đề kỹ thuật; ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các API của LLM hoặc tích hợp tính năng AI vào app.
Kỹ năng Giao tiếp: Chủ động report tiến độ, gom nhóm vấn đề để xử lý dứt điểm. Có khả năng "phiên dịch" các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp thành ngôn ngữ dễ hiểu cho team non-tech hoặc khách hàng.
Khả năng review code, hướng dẫn (mentor) cho các thành viên khác là một lợi thế lớn.
Điểm cộng :
Sẵn sàng học hỏi, nghiên cứu các công nghệ mới một cách chủ động.
Có khả năng làm thêm mảng Web sử dụng ReactJS.
Có thể đọc hiểu hoặc code được Backend bằng Java (Spring Boot / Java Core) để dễ dàng phối hợp xử lý luồng API với đội Backend

current student

Timebeat.app is a global technology company headquartered in London, UK, specialising in ultra-precise (nanosecond-level) time synchronisation solutions for 5G telecommunications, financial systems, and data centres.
As we continue to expand our operations in Vietnam, we are looking for talented individuals to join our growing team and support the delivery of cutting-edge products and digital experiences.

Role Overview

Web Developer
with strong hands-on experience in
Wix and Shopify
to join our Ho Chi Minh City office.
In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining and enhancing our company website and e-commerce store. You will work closely with the Head of Brand & Marketing to implement content updates, support digital campaigns, and continuously improve user experience and conversion performance.
You will also be expected to leverage modern AI tools (such as Claude or similar) to accelerate development workflows, generate solutions, and improve efficiency across web, content, and optimisation tasks.

Key Responsibilities
Manage, maintain, and optimise our Wix website and Shopify store
Implement content updates, landing pages, and campaign assets
Improve website performance, responsiveness, and user experience
Support SEO optimisation, analytics tracking, and conversion improvements
Troubleshoot website issues and ensure smooth day-to-day operation
Collaborate with marketing and design teams on new initiatives
Leverage AI tools (e.g. Claude) to assist with coding, content generation, debugging, and workflow automation
requirement:
Required Skills & Experience
Strong proficiency in English (written and spoken)
Proven hands-on experience with
Wix and Shopify
Solid understanding of
HTML, CSS
, and modern web tools
Familiarity with
SEO, Google Analytics, and conversion tracking
High attention to detail, organisation, and consistency
Experience working cross-functionally with marketing or creative teams
Comfortable using AI tools (e.g. Claude or similar) to support development, problem-solving, and productivity
Nice to Have (Bonus Skills)
Experience with
Figma, Canva, or Adobe Creative Suite
Familiarity with
email marketing tools
(e.g. Klaviyo, Mailchimp)
Basic understanding of
UX/UI principles
and A/B testing
Exposure to
tech, fintech, or SaaS environments

Thiết kế và xây dựng các API (RESTful Services) phía Backend đảm bảo tính mở rộng, bảo mật và hiệu suất cao cho dữ liệu lớn.

location: Centec Tower - 72-74 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: ReactJS, English, AI, NodeJS
job_description:
Overview
We are moving away from traditional "hand-coded" development. Our team operates at the intersection of
AI-Agent efficiency
and
High-Level Architecture
. Your first mission is to drive our
Intranet
using a Metadata-Driven approach.
However, we are hiring for the long term. You will be a foundational member of the team, helping us build a modular software ecosystem that will power the company's future projects.
Responsibilities
Agentic Development:
You will use
Claude Code
as your primary partner. You won't spend your day writing boilerplate; you will spend it directing AI to build high-quality, tested, and secure features.
Metadata Mastery:
You will design systems where logic is driven by. Your goal is to build tools that are so flexible they can be "reconfigured" for new use cases without rewriting the core engine.
System Guardian:
You will oversee the "big picture." While AI generates the code, you ensure the architecture remains clean, scalable, and easy to maintain for years to come.
Future Planning:
As the company grows, you will help design and implement new internal and external platforms using our "modular-first" philosophy.
requirement:
Candidate Requirements
Node.js & React:
3+ years of professional experience. You should be comfortable with the "Middle" level, meaning you can solve problems independently without constant hand-holding.
AI Agent Mastery:
This is non-negotiable. You must have a proven workflow for working with
Claude Code
(or similar agents). You should know how to write effective CLAUDE.md files and how to "course-correct" an AI when it goes off-track.
System Logic:
Experience with
Metadata Driven
systems (where the UI and logic are defined by data/JSON rather than static code) is a huge plus.
English:
Good reading and writing skills (IELTS ~6.0+ equivalent) to interact with AI tools and technical documentation effectively.

At ROSEN, we are at the forefront of the digital transformation of critical infrastructure anomaly assessment. As part of our strategic vision, we are developing a state-of-the-art, AI-driven solution designed to modernize our evaluation processes, increase efficiency, and deliver high-quality results to our customers.

Our new project is a key pillar of our digital transformation strategy and focuses on cloud-native architectures, advanced AI models and a modern JavaScript technology stack to streamline workflows, modernize the portfolio, and revolutionize how we analyze and interpret pipeline integrity data. By leveraging machine learning, advanced data processing, and cutting-edge web technologies, we aim to significantly reduce cycle times, increase customer satisfaction, and provide an intuitive, seamless user experience.

Your responsibilities:
Develop and maintain high-performance web applications using React and TypeScript
Implement and optimize backend services and APIs running in a Kubernetes powered Azure environment
Work within a monorepo architecture to ensure modularity and efficient code management
Collaborate closely with AI & Data teams to interact with real-time analytics and machine learning models
Ensure reliability, observability, and scalability of applications through best practices in CI/CD, monitoring, and infrastructure automation
Actively contribute to architectural decisions and improvements in Kubernetes based deployments
requirement:
To become part of the ROSEN family,
you are team minded and convince by an independent and structured work behavior. Moreover, you should bring with you:
Degree in the field of information technology, computer science or comparable
Minimum of 5 years professional experience in Full Stack development, with proven expertise in React, Next.js, and TypeScript
Minimum of 3 years of proficiency in at least one Cloud Services Provider
Monorepo architectures and tooling (Turborepo) knowledge is desirable
Minimum of 1 year of relevant experience with NestJS
Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and DevOps best practices
A problem-solving mindset, strong collaboration skills, and a passion for building scalable, resilient systems
Fluency in English (written and spoken)

ABILITIES

location: Sala urban area, An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh

job_description:

điều phối hiệu quả và đảm bảo việc triển khai sản phẩm diễn ra mượt mà từ ý tưởng đến khi vận hành
. Ở vị trí này, bạn sẽ đóng góp trực tiếp vào chất lượng và tốc độ ra mắt sản phẩm, hai yếu tố quyết định sự thành công của một game trên thị trường.
Bạn sẽ là cầu nối giữa Product, Game Design, Engineering, Artist và QA — đảm bảo các kế hoạch được thực thi đúng hướng, đúng tiến độ, và mang lại kết quả thực tế sau khi release.
Đây là vai trò phù hợp với những người không chỉ theo dõi công việc, mà còn
chủ động xử lý vấn đề và giữ cho mọi thứ vận hành trơn tru trong môi trường phát triển liên tục
.
Lập kế hoạch và theo dõi tiến độ triển khai các feature/game update
Làm việc chặt chẽ với Product Owner/Game Designer để làm rõ scope, ưu tiên và timeline
Điều phối các team (Design, Engineering, QA, Art) nhằm đảm bảo quá trình triển khai diễn ra hiệu quả
Chủ động phát hiện, theo dõi và xử lý các vấn đề phát sinh trong quá trình phát triển
Theo dõi hiệu quả feature sau khi release và đề xuất các hướng cải tiến phù hợp
Tham gia triển khai các hoạt động LiveOps (event, content update)
Đóng góp vào việc cải tiến quy trình làm việc nhằm nâng cao hiệu suất của team
requirement:

Có khả năng việc với team đa chức năng (Design, Engineering, Art, QA)

Tư duy logic rõ ràng, có khả năng phân tích và xử lý vấn đề
Có tinh thần trách nhiệm và đảm bảo công việc được hoàn thành đến kết quả cuối cùng

Từng làm việc trong môi trường có nhịp update liên tục

job_title: Giám đốc thiết kế & quản lý trải nghiệm số - Head of UX
location: 36 Hoàng Cầu, O Cho Dua, Ha Noi
required_skills: UI-UX, Adobe XD, Adobe, Sketch, Figma
job_description:
1.Phát triển và quản lý chiến lược UI/UX:
Xây dựng chiến lược thiết kế trải nghiệm người dùng tổng thể cho các sản phẩm và dịch vụ của ngân hàng số, đảm bảo trải nghiệm liền mạch và trực quan trên mọi nền tảng.
Định hướng và giám sát việc thực hiện các dự án thiết kế UI/UX, từ giai đoạn ý tưởng ban đầu đến sản phẩm cuối cùng.
Đảm bảo tính nhất quán và tuân thủ các nguyên tắc thương hiệu và tiêu chuẩn thiết kế trong toàn bộ hệ sinh thái kỹ thuật số của ngân hàng.
2.Nghiên cứu người dùng và cải tiến sản phẩm:
Lãnh đạo các hoạt động nghiên cứu người dùng, bao gồm phân tích hành vi, phỏng vấn, khảo sát và kiểm thử A/B để thu thập dữ liệu giúp đưa ra các quyết định thiết kế dựa trên dữ liệu thực tế.
Cải tiến và tối ưu hóa UI/UX dựa trên phản hồi người dùng và phân tích dữ liệu, đảm bảo sản phẩm luôn đạt hiệu suất cao nhất.
3.Lãnh đạo và phát triển đội ngũ thiết kế:
Đào tạo, hướng dẫn và phát triển đội ngũ thiết kế UI/UX nội bộ, bao gồm việc tuyển dụng, xây dựng kế hoạch phát triển nghề nghiệp và đánh giá hiệu suất làm việc của nhân viên.
Xây dựng văn hóa sáng tạo và học hỏi liên tục trong đội ngũ thiết kế, khuyến khích thử nghiệm các công nghệ và phương pháp thiết kế mới.
Tổ chức các hội thảo, buổi đào tạo, và hoạt động cộng tác để chia sẻ kiến thức và kỹ năng giữa các thành viên trong nhóm.
4.Quản lý quy trình và công cụ thiết kế:
Thiết lập và cải tiến quy trình làm việc giữa các bộ phận liên quan như phát triển sản phẩm, marketing, và kỹ thuật để đảm bảo sự phối hợp nhịp nhàng trong việc phát triển và triển khai UI/UX.
Quản lý và lựa chọn các công cụ thiết kế hiện đại và phù hợp, như Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, để hỗ trợ công việc thiết kế hiệu quả.
Phát triển và duy trì hệ thống thiết kế (design system) để đảm bảo tính thống nhất và dễ dàng mở rộng cho các sản phẩm số của ngân hàng.
5.Đảm bảo chất lượng và hiệu quả thiết kế:
Thiết lập và theo dõi các chỉ số đo lường hiệu quả thiết kế (UI/UX KPIs), bao gồm mức độ hài lòng của người dùng, tỷ lệ chuyển đổi, và thời gian thực hiện nhiệm vụ trên giao diện.
Thực hiện kiểm tra chất lượng cuối cùng đối với tất cả các giao diện trước khi triển khai, đảm bảo không có lỗi và đáp ứng tốt nhất yêu cầu của người dùng.
Phối hợp với bộ phận kỹ thuật để giám sát việc triển khai thiết kế UI/UX, đảm bảo rằng các yếu tố thiết kế được thực hiện đúng cách và hoạt động như mong đợi trên các thiết bị và nền tảng khác nhau.
requirement:
- Tốt nghiệp hệ chính quy các Trường Đại học trong nước hoặc nước ngoài
Chuyên ngành đào tạo: Công nghệ thông tin, Toán tin, Điện tử Viễn thông, kế toán, Tài chính Ngân hàng
- Có từ 10 năm kinh nghiệm trong mảng kiểm thử
- Nắm chắc kiến thức kiểm thử và quy trình kiểm thử
- Thành thạo sử dụng các công cụ quản lý dự án như:Jira, Remine, Trello,..
- Quản lý thời gian và khả năng chia sẻ thông tin tốt

job_description:
ABOUT SIOUX
Sioux Group was founded in 1996 in the Netherlands. With over 1,400 engineers, Sioux supports or acts as the R&D partner of leading high-tech companies. We aim to add value to our clients by developing innovative and high-tech solutions that contribute to a smarter, safer, healthier, more enjoyable, and more sustainable society.
Sioux has been recognized as an employer of choice, including awards such as Best ICT Company to Work For and Great Place to Work. In addition to our strong presence in Europe, Sioux is rapidly expanding in Asia, with offices in Vietnam, China, Singapore, and India.
With a strong heritage and a diverse international team, Sioux is proud of our core values: Own it and make it happen, Grow and innovate together, and Surprise customers. If these values resonate with you, we would love to welcome you to our team.

WE ARE LOOKING FOR A SENIOR AUTOMATION TESTER IN DANANG/HCM TO JOIN US!
As Automation Tester, you ability to develop, implement and refine testing strategies ensures that quality and performance standards are consistently met. Thriving both independently and within a collaborative team, you navigate international and dynamic settings with ease.
This role involves
developing automation tests
to ensure
high-quality equipment control software
across the
semiconductor
equipment control software stack. If you
don’t have prior experience
in this field but are excited to take on the challenge, don’t hesitate to join us - you will
receive training in related domain knowledge
.

Your responsibilities include:
Collaborating with customers/stakeholders to define test architecture
Analyzing customer needs in software requirement engineering
Analyzing, designing, implementing, testing to control software on unit, integration, and system level
Executing manual testing (functional, regression, exploratory) when automation is not feasible
Conducting peer reviews to ensure product quality
Working as an integral part of a Scrum team and handling user stories dedicated to quality assurance
Developing functionality using Agile practices, emphasizing speed and quality
Maintaining clear test documentation (test plans, reports, automation guidelines)
requirement:
QUALIFICATIONS
Technical:
Bachelor degree in Information Technology or Computer Science or related fields
4+ years of experience in
creating and running automated tests
Solid testing experiences
(test strategy, test approach, test plan, test techniques included black box, risk-based, exploratory, Non-UI testing, etc.) specifically for embedded systems and complex software development life cycles
Proficiency in
C#/Java programming for automated test development
Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks (NUnit, Cucumber)
At least 2 years of experience in test automation for desktop applications (Windows, WPF/WinForms) is required for the senior level.
Proven experience integrating automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (GitLab preferred) and working in an Agile/Kanban development process
Working knowledge of Git workflows and version control
Understanding of software testing principles (test design, regression, integration, performance)
Soft skills:
Ability to self-learn and quickly adapt to new technologies
Good command of both English speaking and writing skills in order to fluently communicate with international colleagues and customers
Good sense of teamwork, high responsibility & commitment
Strong logical thinking, proactive and open-minded
Passionate and eager to develop skills through projects in equipment, semiconductors, and related fields
Nice to have:
ISTQB certificate and SQL skill
Familiarity with desktop UI automation tools such as FlaUI is a plus
A background in the semiconductor, or analytical domain
Experience with test automation scripting in Python (e.g., data validation, CI/CD tooling, API tests)
